Ten amendments guaranteed individual rights: speech, religion, press, assembly, arms, due process, jury trial, freedom from excessive punishment. Still the core of American political culture and legal battles today (e.g., Second Amendment gun rights).
events.amazon_title: Founding Brothers: The Revolutionary Generation — Joseph Ellis

events.zh: 1812 戰爭·美英「第二次獨立戰爭」
events.desc_zh: 6 月 18 日美對英宣戰，因英國拿破崙戰爭海上封鎖損美貿易、強徵美水手入英艦。1814 英軍火燒 Washington 包括白宮。但 1814 Ghent 條約回歸戰前狀態。Jackson 1815 在 New Orleans 擊敗英軍(不知已停戰)。戰爭鞏固美國國族認同。
events.desc_en: On June 18, the US declared war on Britain over Napoleonic-era naval blockades hurting American trade and impressment of US sailors. In 1814 British troops burned Washington including the White House. The 1814 Treaty of Ghent restored status quo ante. Jackson's 1815 New Orleans victory (after the war had already ended) rallied national identity.
events.amazon_title: American Revolutions: A Continental History 1750-1804 — Alan Taylor

events.zh: Monroe 主義·美洲歸美洲人
events.desc_zh: 12 月 2 日 Monroe 總統國情咨文宣告：歐洲不得再殖民西半球，美洲事務歐洲別插手，美國不干預歐洲事務。雖無實力執行(19C 仍靠英國海軍)，但 19C 末起成美國外交根本原則，1904 Roosevelt 推論擴張為積極干預拉美。
events.desc_en: On December 2, President Monroe's State of the Union declared: Europe cannot colonize the Western Hemisphere further, Europe stay out of American affairs, America won't interfere in Europe. Lacking enforcement power (relied on the British navy through the 19th century), it became the foundational US foreign policy principle from the late 19th century. The 1904 Roosevelt Corollary extended it to active Latin American intervention.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.en: Indian Removal Act — Trail of Tears
events.desc_zh: 5 月 28 日 Jackson 簽 Indian Removal Act，強制五大族(Cherokee、Creek、Choctaw、Chickasaw、Seminole)從東南部遷至 Oklahoma「印第安領地」。1838-39 Cherokee「血淚之路」死 4 千人。是美國早期大規模種族清洗，至今民族記憶傷痛。
events.desc_en: On May 28, Jackson signed the Indian Removal Act, forcibly relocating the Five Civilized Tribes (Cherokee, Creek, Choctaw, Chickasaw, Seminole) from the Southeast to Oklahoma 'Indian Territory.' The 1838-39 Cherokee 'Trail of Tears' killed 4,000 people. An early US mass ethnic cleansing, a lasting national wound.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.zh: 美墨戰爭·美國奪半個墨西哥
events.desc_zh: 4 月 25 日爆發。1848 年 Guadalupe Hidalgo 條約墨國割讓加州、新墨、亞利桑那、科羅拉多、猶他、內華達、懷俄明(計 135 萬平方公里)，美付 1500 萬美元。國土擴 1/3。但新領土是否允奴隸制引燃南北分裂，為 Civil War 埋下遠因。
events.desc_en: Broke out on April 25. The 1848 Treaty of Guadalupe Hidalgo ceded California, New Mexico, Arizona, Colorado, Utah, Nevada, and Wyoming (1.35 million km²) to the US for $15 million. National territory expanded by a third. But whether slavery would be allowed in the new territories ignited the North-South split, seeding the Civil War.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.zh: California Gold Rush·「49 人」西進潮
events.desc_zh: 1 月 James Marshall 於 Sutter's Mill 發現金，消息 1849 年傳開，30 萬「49 人」湧入加州(世界各地，包括中國人稱「金山」)。加州 1850 年成州。3 年金礦產值 20 億美元。移民浪潮奠定西部開發基礎，但原住民被驅殺、華工遭歧視。
events.desc_en: On January 24 James Marshall discovered gold at Sutter's Mill; news spread in 1849. 300,000 '49ers' flooded California from around the world (Chinese called it 'Gold Mountain'). California became a state in 1850. Three years of gold output totaled $2 billion. The migration laid the foundation for Western development — but indigenous peoples were driven out and killed, and Chinese laborers faced discrimination.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.desc_zh: 3 月 Rutherford Hayes 當選總統交換條件：南方承認其勝選，聯邦撤軍南部終結 Reconstruction。南方白人重掌權，Jim Crow 種族隔離制、剝奪黑人投票權、私刑暴力興起。黑人從「奴隸」變「二等公民」近 100 年。民權運動 1950s 起才逆轉。
events.desc_en: In March, Rutherford Hayes's presidency was secured via a compromise: the South accepted his win, and federal troops withdrew — ending Reconstruction. Southern whites regained power; Jim Crow segregation, Black disenfranchisement, and lynching rose. Blacks went from 'slaves' to 'second-class citizens' for nearly a century. Only the 1950s Civil Rights Movement reversed it.
events.amazon_title: Reconstruction: America's Unfinished Revolution 1863-1877 — Eric Foner

events.zh: Ellis Island 開放·大移民潮
events.desc_zh: 1 月 1 日 Ellis Island 移民檢疫站在 New York 港啟用。1892-1954 年共 1200 萬移民通過，主要來自義、愛、猶太、波蘭、俄羅斯、希臘。今日 40% 美國人有祖先通過此站。與 Statue of Liberty(1886)並列美國多元民族象徵。1924 移民配額法大幅收緊。
events.desc_en: On January 1, Ellis Island immigrant inspection station opened in New York Harbor. From 1892 to 1954, 12 million immigrants passed through — mostly Italian, Irish, Jewish, Polish, Russian, Greek. 40% of Americans today have ancestors who came through. With the Statue of Liberty (1886), it became the symbol of American multi-ethnic identity. The 1924 Immigration Act drastically tightened quotas.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.zh: 美西戰爭·美國成全球帝國
events.desc_zh: 4 月 21 日美對西班牙宣戰，藉口 USS Maine 在 Havana 爆炸。10 週勝利。12 月 Paris 條約美獲古巴(1902 獨立)、波多黎各、關島、菲律賓(買 2000 萬美元)。美國從大陸強國轉為跨太平洋帝國。Theodore Roosevelt 因 Rough Riders 成英雄、1901 年任總統。
events.desc_en: On April 21, the US declared war on Spain over the USS Maine explosion in Havana. Victory came in 10 weeks. The December Treaty of Paris gave the US Cuba (independent 1902), Puerto Rico, Guam, and the Philippines (bought for $20 million). America transformed from continental power to trans-Pacific empire. Theodore Roosevelt's Rough Riders made him a hero; he became president in 1901.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.desc_zh: 8 月 18 日 Tennessee 州第 36 個批准 19th Amendment，女性獲全國投票權。1848 Seneca Falls 起 72 年運動。Susan B. Anthony、Elizabeth Cady Stanton、Alice Paul 先後領導。比英國(1918 部分)晚、比德國(1919)晚，但比法(1944)早。黑人婦女至 1965 投票權法才實質擁有。
events.desc_en: On August 18, Tennessee became the 36th state to ratify the 19th Amendment — women gained nationwide suffrage. A 72-year movement since 1848 Seneca Falls. Led by Susan B. Anthony, Elizabeth Cady Stanton, and Alice Paul. Later than the UK (1918 partial) and Germany (1919), earlier than France (1944). Black women only gained effective voting rights with the 1965 Voting Rights Act.
events.wiki_zh: https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/美國憲法第十九修正案
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.desc_zh: 3 月 4 日 Franklin Roosevelt 就職，百日內推動 15 項大法案：銀行改革、工作救濟、農業補貼、基建、社會安全、勞工保障。AAA、NRA、TVA、SEC、CCC、WPA。政府角色大幅擴張，現代美國自由派(liberal)政治傳統奠基，影響 40 年直到雷根。
events.desc_en: On March 4, Franklin Roosevelt took office and pushed 15 major laws in 100 days: banking reform, work relief, agricultural subsidies, infrastructure, social security, labor protection. AAA, NRA, TVA, SEC, CCC, WPA. The government role expanded dramatically — founding the modern American liberal tradition that shaped 40 years until Reagan.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.zh: 廣島長崎原爆·終結 WW2
events.desc_zh: 8 月 6 日 B-29「Enola Gay」投下 Little Boy(廣島，約 14 萬死)，8 月 9 日投下 Fat Man(長崎，約 7 萬死)。8 月 15 日日本投降 WW2 終。是史上僅有兩次核武實戰。開啟原子時代、冷戰核恐怖平衡；至今倫理爭議未止。
events.desc_en: On August 6, B-29 'Enola Gay' dropped Little Boy on Hiroshima (~140,000 dead); on August 9, Fat Man hit Nagasaki (~70,000 dead). Japan surrendered on August 15, ending WW2. History's only wartime use of nuclear weapons. The atomic age began; the Cold War nuclear terror balance followed. Ethical debates continue.
events.wiki_zh: https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/廣島與長崎原子彈爆炸
events.amazon_title: Truman — David McCullough

events.desc_zh: 4 月 3 日 Truman 簽 European Recovery Program，向 16 個西歐國家提供 130 億美元援助 4 年。目的：穩定歐洲經濟、防共產蔓延、擴大美國出口市場。戰後西歐 GDP 恢復超戰前、美蘇冷戰分界鞏固、歐盟前身 OEEC 成立。外交史上最成功的「軟實力」計畫之一。
events.desc_en: On April 3, Truman signed the European Recovery Program, providing $13 billion in aid to 16 Western European nations over 4 years. Goals: stabilize European economies, prevent communist spread, expand US export markets. Post-war Western European GDP surpassed pre-war levels; the Cold War divide solidified; the OEEC (EU precursor) was founded. One of the most successful 'soft power' campaigns in diplomatic history.
events.amazon_title: Truman — David McCullough

events.desc_zh: 6 月 25 日北韓金日成軍越 38 度線入侵南韓。UN 安理會(蘇聯缺席)授權美主導聯合國軍反攻。9 月 MacArthur 仁川登陸反推。11 月中國志願軍參戰。1953 年 7 月停戰，38 度線回歸。美軍死 3.7 萬人。是冷戰首場熱戰、亞洲代理戰模板。南北分裂至今。
events.desc_en: On June 25, North Korea's Kim Il-sung crossed the 38th parallel invading the South. UN Security Council (Soviet boycott) authorized US-led UN forces. In September, MacArthur's Inchon landing turned the tide. In November, Chinese 'volunteers' entered the war. July 1953 armistice restored the 38th parallel. 37,000 US deaths. The first hot Cold War; model for Asian proxy wars. North-South division persists.
events.amazon_title: The Coldest Winter: America and the Korean War — David Halberstam

events.desc_zh: 2 月 9 日 Wisconsin 參議員 McCarthy 演講宣稱手持 205 個國務院共產黨員名單。引爆 4 年「紅色恐慌」：政府、好萊塢、大學大規模整肅被指共產同情者。HUAC 黑名單毀數千人職涯。1954 年 McCarthy 被參議院譴責失勢，但冷戰意識形態、反共心態深植美國文化 40 年。
events.desc_en: On February 9, Wisconsin Senator McCarthy claimed to hold a list of 205 State Department communists. Four years of 'Red Scare' followed: mass purges in government, Hollywood, and universities of accused communist sympathizers. The HUAC blacklist destroyed thousands of careers. The Senate censured McCarthy in 1954, ending his influence — but Cold War ideology and anti-communist mentality shaped American culture for 40 years.
events.amazon_title: Truman — David McCullough

events.desc_zh: 3 月 2 日 Johnson 下令「Rolling Thunder」戰略轟炸北越、派第一批 Marines 登陸峴港。越戰從顧問團規模升級為全面戰。至 1969 年美軍達 54 萬。1968 Tet 攻勢失美國民心。1973 停戰、1975 北越攻陷西貢。美軍死 5.8 萬、越南死 2-300 萬。美國對外政策痛史。
events.desc_en: On March 2, Johnson ordered 'Rolling Thunder' strategic bombing of North Vietnam and the first Marines landed at Da Nang. The Vietnam War escalated from advisor presence to full war. By 1969, US forces reached 540,000. The 1968 Tet Offensive cost American public support. 1973 armistice, 1975 Saigon fell to North Vietnam. 58,000 US dead, 2-3 million Vietnamese dead. A traumatic American foreign policy history.
events.amazon_title: Vietnam: A History — Stanley Karnow

events.desc_zh: 8 月 8 日 Nixon 面對彈劾辭職，是美史上首位辭職總統。1972 6 月 Watergate 複合體民主黨總部被竊聽案 2 年查證涉及白宮掩蓋。Washington Post「Deep Throat」爆料、特別檢察官、國會聽證。Ford 任總統，赦免 Nixon。美國總統權力與新聞自由戰役標誌性案例。
events.desc_en: On August 8, facing impeachment, Nixon resigned — the first US president to do so. Two years of investigation after the June 1972 Watergate Democratic HQ break-in uncovered White House cover-up. Washington Post's 'Deep Throat' leaks, special prosecutor, congressional hearings. Ford became president and pardoned Nixon. A landmark battle between presidential power and press freedom.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.desc_zh: 11 月 4 日 Reagan 以 489 選舉人票壓倒 Carter 49 張當選。減稅、減政府(「政府不是解決方案，政府是問題」)、擴軍備、反共積極對抗蘇聯、支持 mujahideen。1983 Star Wars SDI 計畫、1987 Berlin 牆演講。與 Thatcher 聯手贏冷戰。美國從 New Deal 自由派轉向自由市場保守派時代。
events.desc_en: On November 4, Reagan won 489-49 electoral votes over Carter. Tax cuts, smaller government ('government is not the solution, government is the problem'), defense buildup, aggressive anti-communism, supporting mujahideen. 1983 Star Wars SDI, 1987 Berlin Wall speech. With Thatcher he won the Cold War. America shifted from New Deal liberalism to free-market conservatism.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.zh: Brown v Board·學校分離違憲
events.desc_zh: 5 月 17 日最高法院 9-0 判定公立學校種族隔離違反憲法第 14 修正案「平等保護」。推翻 1896 Plessy v Ferguson「分離但平等」原則。南方白人「massive resistance」拒執行。1957 Little Rock Nine、1960s 強制校車融合。現代美國民權運動法律奠基。
events.desc_en: On May 17, the Supreme Court unanimously ruled public school racial segregation violated the 14th Amendment's equal protection. Overturned the 1896 Plessy v. Ferguson 'separate but equal.' Southern whites responded with 'massive resistance.' The 1957 Little Rock Nine and 1960s forced busing followed. The legal foundation of the modern Civil Rights Movement.
events.wiki_zh: https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/布朗訴托皮卡教育局案
events.amazon_title: Parting the Waters: America in the King Years 1954-63 — Taylor Branch

events.desc_zh: 8 月 28 日「Washington 大遊行」25 萬人集結 Lincoln 紀念堂，MLK 發表「I Have a Dream」17 分鐘即興演講。推動次年 Civil Rights Act 1964、1965 Voting Rights Act 通過。是 20 世紀最偉大演講之一、民權運動巔峰時刻。
events.desc_en: On August 28, 250,000 gathered at the Lincoln Memorial for the March on Washington; MLK delivered the 17-minute improvised 'I Have a Dream' speech. It helped pass the 1964 Civil Rights Act and 1965 Voting Rights Act. One of the 20th century's greatest speeches, the peak of the Civil Rights Movement.
events.amazon_title: Parting the Waters: America in the King Years 1954-63 — Taylor Branch

events.zh: 1968 MLK + RFK 刺殺·美國動盪年
events.desc_zh: 4 月 4 日 MLK 在 Memphis 被刺殺。6 月 5 日 RFK 在 LA 勝加州初選後被刺。加上 Tet 攻勢、Chicago 民主黨大會鎮壓、Columbia 學運，1968 是美國二戰後最動盪的一年。尼克森「沉默多數」策略勝選，60 年代理想主義黃金期落幕。
events.desc_en: On April 4, MLK was assassinated in Memphis. On June 5, RFK was shot in LA after winning the California primary. With the Tet Offensive, Chicago DNC police riots, and Columbia student protests, 1968 was the most turbulent year in post-WW2 America. Nixon's 'silent majority' strategy won; the 60s idealistic golden age ended.
events.amazon_title: Parting the Waters: America in the King Years 1954-63 — Taylor Branch

events.zh: Hollywood 黃金期·Gone with Wind + Oz
events.desc_zh: 12 月 15 日 Gone with the Wind 首映，同年 Wizard of Oz、Stagecoach、Wuthering Heights 上映。1930s-40s Hollywood studio 制度黃金期：MGM/Warner/Paramount 等 8 大製片廠主宰全球影視。明星制度(Gable/Garbo/Bogart)、彩色片、音樂劇、西部片、Film Noir 為美國軟實力奠基。
events.desc_en: On December 15, Gone with the Wind premiered; the same year saw The Wizard of Oz, Stagecoach, and Wuthering Heights. The 1930s-40s Hollywood studio system's golden age: the Big 8 (MGM, Warner, Paramount, etc.) dominated global cinema. The star system (Gable, Garbo, Bogart), color, musicals, Westerns, and film noir laid the foundation of American soft power.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.zh: Elvis·Rock and Roll 全國爆紅
events.desc_zh: 3 月 Elvis Presley 發行首張專輯首周售破百萬、同年 6 月 Ed Sullivan Show 上鏡。21 歲 Elvis 融合非裔藍調 + 白人鄉村成 Rock and Roll，震撼保守社會、青少年文化誕生。與 Chuck Berry、Little Richard 並開啟流行音樂革命。1950s-60s 美國文化影響全世界。
events.desc_en: In March, Elvis Presley's debut album sold 1 million in its first week; in June, he appeared on Ed Sullivan Show. The 21-year-old Elvis fused Black blues with white country into Rock and Roll — shocking conservative society and birthing teen culture. With Chuck Berry and Little Richard, he launched the pop music revolution. 1950s-60s American culture shaped the world.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.desc_zh: 10 月 29 日 UCLA 與 Stanford 間首次封包傳輸「LO」(原欲打「LOGIN」系統當機)。ARPA(國防部)資助、Bolt Beranek Newman 建，4 節點擴至 1973 23 節點。TCP/IP(1983)、DNS(1985)、WWW(1991) 演化至今日網際網路，美國科技影響全球日常生活。
events.desc_en: On October 29, the first packet transmission between UCLA and Stanford sent 'LO' (the system crashed trying to send 'LOGIN'). ARPA (Defense Department) funded, Bolt Beranek Newman built — 4 nodes expanded to 23 by 1973. TCP/IP (1983), DNS (1985), WWW (1991) evolved into today's Internet — American tech shaping global daily life.
events.amazon_title: The Innovators: How a Group of Hackers, Geniuses, and Geeks Created the Digital Revolution — Walter Isaacson

events.zh: Apple 成立·Silicon Valley 時代
events.desc_zh: 4 月 1 日 Jobs、Wozniak、Wayne 在 Jobs 家車庫成立 Apple Computer。Apple I 家用電腦售 666 美元、1977 Apple II 量產成功。同期 Microsoft 1975 成立、Intel 1968、HP、Fairchild。Silicon Valley 從軍工 → 半導體 → PC → 網路 → 行動 → AI 主導全球科技 50 年。
events.desc_en: On April 1, Jobs, Wozniak, and Wayne founded Apple Computer in Jobs's family garage. Apple I home computer sold for $666; 1977 Apple II went mass-market. Microsoft was founded 1975, Intel 1968, HP and Fairchild earlier. Silicon Valley went from military-industrial to semiconductors to PCs to internet to mobile to AI — dominating global tech for 50 years.
events.amazon_title: The Innovators: How a Group of Hackers, Geniuses, and Geeks Created the Digital Revolution — Walter Isaacson

events.desc_zh: 6 月 29 日第一代 iPhone 上市。Jobs 1 月 Macworld「三合一裝置」發表演講是矽谷史上最著名產品發表。重塑手機、相機、音樂、app 經濟。2008 App Store 啟用催生全球 app 產業。Apple 2018 首破兆美元市值、2023 破 3 兆。智慧型手機普及改變全球 70 億人生活方式。
events.desc_en: On June 29, the first iPhone launched. Jobs's January Macworld 'three-in-one device' keynote became Silicon Valley's most famous product launch. It reshaped phones, cameras, music, and the app economy. The 2008 App Store birthed the global app industry. Apple hit $1 trillion in 2018 and $3 trillion in 2023. Smartphones changed daily life for 7 billion people worldwide.
events.amazon_title: The Innovators: How a Group of Hackers, Geniuses, and Geeks Created the Digital Revolution — Walter Isaacson

events.zh: 波灣戰爭·美軍解放科威特
events.desc_zh: 1 月 17 日美領 34 國聯軍啟動「沙漠風暴」。42 天空襲 + 100 小時地面戰後解放科威特。伊軍 2-3.5 萬死、美軍僅 294。CNN 24 小時直播戰爭成新媒體時代標誌。蘇聯解體前夕冷戰結束，美國確立單極超強地位，為 2003 伊拉克戰爭埋下 12 年伏筆。
events.desc_en: On January 17, the US-led 34-nation coalition launched Operation Desert Storm. 42 days of airstrikes plus 100 hours of ground war liberated Kuwait. 20,000-35,000 Iraqi dead vs. 294 American. CNN's 24-hour war coverage marked the new media era. On the eve of Soviet collapse and Cold War's end, America established its unipolar superpower status — setting up the 2003 Iraq War 12 years later.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.zh: 伊拉克戰爭·美國霸權頂峰與反彈
events.desc_zh: 3 月 20 日 Bush 以「大規模殺傷武器」(事後證實不存在)為由入侵伊拉克。3 週推翻 Saddam，但 8 年佔領陷入遜尼-什葉內戰 + 基地 + ISIS 興起。2011 撤軍。4800 美軍+10 萬伊拉克平民死亡。美國單邊主義達頂峰也受全球反彈，為中俄崛起提供窗口。
events.desc_en: On March 20, Bush invaded Iraq on 'weapons of mass destruction' pretext (later proven false). Three weeks to topple Saddam, but 8 years of occupation descended into Sunni-Shia civil war, al-Qaeda, and ISIS rise. 2011 withdrawal. 4,800 US and 100,000+ Iraqi civilian deaths. American unilateralism peaked and drew global backlash, opening the window for Chinese-Russian rise.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.desc_zh: 9 月 15 日 Lehman Brothers 破產(158 年史最大企業破產)引爆全球金融危機。次貸危機蔓延至衍生性商品、AIG 被國有化、美聯儲救市、美股跌 50%。Obama 推 7870 億紓困 + Dodd-Frank 改革。全球進入零利率 + QE 時代 10 年，財富不均加劇、民粹崛起。
events.desc_en: On September 15, Lehman Brothers' bankruptcy (largest corporate bankruptcy in 158 years) triggered the global financial crisis. Subprime contagion spread through derivatives; AIG was nationalized; the Fed bailed out; stocks dropped 50%. Obama's $787 billion stimulus + Dodd-Frank reforms followed. A decade of zero rates and QE globally; inequality worsened, populism rose.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.zh: Obama 當選·首位黑人總統
events.desc_zh: 11 月 4 日 Obama 以 365 票擊敗 McCain 173 當選第 44 任總統、首位非裔美國總統。被視為美國種族和解里程碑。8 年任期推 Affordable Care Act(歐記健保)、伊朗核協議、古巴關係正常化、巴黎氣候協定。但川普 2016 反撲、白人民粹反彈也由此醞釀。
events.desc_en: On November 4, Obama defeated McCain 365-173 to become the 44th President and first African-American. Seen as a milestone of racial reconciliation. His 8-year tenure brought the Affordable Care Act (Obamacare), Iran nuclear deal, Cuba normalization, and Paris climate accord. But Trump's 2016 backlash and white populist resentment brewed here.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.zh: Trump 當選·民粹民族主義復興
events.desc_zh: 11 月 8 日 Trump 以 306 票擊敗 Clinton 232 當選，是首位無政治或軍旅資歷的總統。Make America Great Again、反移民、反自由貿易、懷疑氣候變遷、退出巴黎協定/WHO。2021 年 1 月 6 日支持者衝進國會。2024 年再當選成第 47 任、史上第二位非連任回歸總統。
events.desc_en: On November 8, Trump defeated Clinton 306-232 — the first president with no political or military experience. Make America Great Again, anti-immigration, anti-free-trade, climate skeptic, withdrew from Paris and WHO. On January 6, 2021, his supporters stormed the Capitol. Re-elected in 2024 as the 47th president — only the second non-consecutive returning president in history.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.desc_zh: 3 月 13 日 Trump 宣布國家緊急狀態。美國累計 120+ 萬死(全球最多)，佔世界死亡人數 1/6。封鎖 vs 開放、口罩 vs 反口罩、疫苗 vs 反疫苗成政治分裂新戰場。2020 年 5 月 George Floyd 被警殺引爆 BLM 運動。經濟刺激 6 兆美元、通膨暴走。Biden 2020.11 當選。
events.desc_en: On March 13, Trump declared national emergency. US accumulated 1.2 million+ deaths (world's highest), 1/6 of global deaths. Lockdown vs. reopen, masks vs. anti-masks, vaccines vs. anti-vaccines became new political battlegrounds. In May 2020, George Floyd's police killing ignited Black Lives Matter. $6 trillion stimulus followed by raging inflation. Biden elected November 2020.
events.amazon_title: These Truths: A History of the United States — Jill Lepore

events.desc_zh: 1950/9/15 MacArthur 策劃仁川兩棲登陸，切斷北韓軍後勤，9 月底收復漢城，扭轉戰局。
events.desc_en: MacArthur's amphibious landing at Inchon (Sep 15, 1950) cut North Korean supply lines and reversed the war.
events.amazon_title: The Coldest Winter: America and the Korean War

events.en: Chinese People's Volunteer Army Enters Korea
events.desc_zh: 1950/10/19 彭德懷率 30 萬中國人民志願軍跨鴨綠江入朝，扭轉戰局，將 UN 軍推回 38 線以南。
events.desc_en: Peng Dehuai led ~300,000 Chinese 'volunteers' across the Yalu on Oct 19, 1950, reversing UN gains and pushing UN forces south.

events.zh: 長津湖戰役·UN 軍撤退
events.desc_zh: 1950/11-12 零下 30 度嚴寒中，美國海軍陸戰隊第 1 師在長津湖被中國第 9 兵團圍困，突圍撤至興南港。
events.desc_en: In sub-zero cold (Nov-Dec 1950), US 1st Marine Division broke out of Chinese encirclement at Chosin Reservoir to the port of Hungnam.

events.desc_zh: 1953/7/27 UN 軍、中國志願軍、北韓在板門店簽署停戰協定，南北韓以 38 線附近停火；和平條約迄今未簽。
events.desc_en: The armistice signed at Panmunjom (Jul 27, 1953) ended active combat along the 38th parallel. No peace treaty has ever been signed.

events.desc_zh: 停戰協定劃設 4 公里寬、250 公里長的非軍事區，70 多年成為冷戰最前線象徵。
events.desc_en: The armistice established a 4 km wide, 250 km long DMZ separating the Koreas—still a Cold War frontier 70+ years later.

events.zh: UN 安理會 83 號決議
events.desc_zh: 蘇聯代表因中華民國席次問題杯葛聯合國，安理會在其缺席下通過 83 號決議，授權會員國支援南韓。
events.desc_en: With the USSR boycotting over China's UN seat, the Security Council passed Resolution 83 authorizing military aid to South Korea.

events.en: Battle of Osan — Task Force Smith
events.desc_zh: 1950/7/5 美軍 Task Force Smith 在烏山首戰北韓 T-34 戰車，400 人部隊傷亡過半。
events.desc_en: On Jul 5, 1950, the hastily deployed 'Task Force Smith' met North Korean T-34s at Osan—half of the ~400 men were casualties.

events.desc_zh: 1950/8-9 UN 軍退守釜山周邊 230 公里防線苦撐 50 餘日，為仁川登陸爭取時間。
events.desc_en: UN forces held a 230 km defensive perimeter around Pusan for ~50 days (Aug-Sep 1950), buying time for the Inchon landing.

events.zh: 共軍佔首爾·第三次漢城攻防
events.desc_zh: 1951/1/4 中朝聯軍第三次攻下漢城，UN 軍退往南方；3 月 UN 軍反攻再奪。
events.desc_en: On Jan 4, 1951, Chinese/North Korean forces captured Seoul for the third time; UN forces retook it in March.

events.desc_zh: MacArthur 公開主張對中國用核武、擴大戰爭，Truman 1951/4/11 以「違抗總統意旨」撤職。
events.desc_en: After MacArthur publicly advocated escalating war with China (including nuclear use), Truman relieved him on Apr 11, 1951.

events.desc_zh: 1951/7/10 雙方在開城首次坐下談，其後談判拖 2 年、戰爭以陣地戰消耗至 1953。
events.desc_en: Armistice talks began at Kaesong on Jul 10, 1951—negotiations dragged for two years while the front stalemated.

events.desc_zh: Eisenhower 選前承諾「I shall go to Korea」，1952/12 當選後立即訪韓，為結束戰爭作準備。
events.desc_en: Eisenhower's campaign pledge 'I shall go to Korea' was fulfilled in Dec 1952, setting stage for armistice.

events.desc_zh: 1953/3/5 Stalin 去世，蘇聯新領導層施壓中朝接受停戰條件，談判加速。
events.desc_en: Stalin's death on Mar 5, 1953 prompted new Soviet leadership to pressure China/North Korea toward armistice.

events.desc_zh: 1775/4/19 英軍往 Concord 搜繳民兵武器，在 Lexington 與 Concord 與民兵交火，獨立戰爭首戰。
events.desc_en: On Apr 19, 1775, British troops clashed with colonial militia at Lexington and Concord—the opening shots of the Revolution.
events.amazon_title: American Creation

events.desc_zh: 1776/7/4 大陸會議通過 Jefferson 起草的獨立宣言，宣告 13 殖民地脫離英國。
events.desc_en: Adopted Jul 4, 1776, the Declaration (drafted by Jefferson) proclaimed the 13 colonies' independence from Britain.

events.zh: Saratoga 戰役·法國決意參戰
events.desc_zh: 1777/10/17 Burgoyne 率 6000 英軍在 Saratoga 投降，法國隨後決定公開參戰援美，扭轉戰局。
events.desc_en: Burgoyne's surrender of ~6,000 British troops at Saratoga (Oct 17, 1777) convinced France to openly join the war as US ally.

events.desc_zh: 1778/2/6 Franklin 在巴黎簽 Treaty of Alliance，法國正式參戰反英，戰爭成為全球衝突。
events.desc_en: Franklin signed the Treaty of Alliance in Paris on Feb 6, 1778—France formally entered the war, making it a global conflict.

events.desc_zh: 1781/10/19 Washington + Rochambeau 聯軍合圍 Cornwallis，英軍 7000 人投降，實質終結戰事。
events.desc_en: Combined Washington/Rochambeau forces besieged Cornwallis at Yorktown; ~7,000 British surrendered on Oct 19, 1781—effectively ending the war.

events.zh: 巴黎條約·英國承認獨立
events.desc_zh: 1783/9/3 英美法西簽巴黎條約，英國承認美國獨立，邊界延伸至密西西比河。
events.desc_en: The Treaty of Paris (Sep 3, 1783) saw Britain recognize US independence with borders extending to the Mississippi.

events.desc_zh: 1774/9/5 12 殖民地代表（Georgia 缺席）聚費城商討應對英國「Intolerable Acts」。
events.desc_en: Delegates from 12 colonies met in Philadelphia (Sep 5, 1774) to coordinate response to Britain's Intolerable Acts.

events.desc_zh: 1775/5/10 Lexington 之後，殖民地在費城再開會，設大陸軍、發行貨幣，實質成為戰時政府。
events.desc_en: Reconvened in Philadelphia (May 10, 1775) after Lexington, it established the Continental Army and issued currency, acting as de facto government.

events.desc_zh: 1775/6/17 波士頓外圍戰役，雖英軍勝但傷亡慘重，民兵證明能正面對抗英正規軍。
events.desc_en: Near Boston on Jun 17, 1775, British forces took the hill but at heavy cost, proving militia could stand against regulars.

events.desc_zh: 1775/6/19 大陸會議任命維吉尼亞人 Washington 為大陸軍總司令，統一指揮權。
events.desc_en: On Jun 19, 1775, the Continental Congress appointed Virginian George Washington as Commander-in-Chief.

events.desc_zh: 1776/1 Paine 匿名出版小冊子，以平民語言論證獨立之必要，3 個月售 12 萬份，塑造輿論。
events.desc_en: Paine's anonymous pamphlet (Jan 1776) made the case for independence in plain language—120k copies sold in 3 months, shaping public opinion.

events.zh: Long Island 戰役·紐約陷落
events.desc_zh: 1776/8/27 Howe 率大軍登陸 Long Island 大敗 Washington，夜間撤退避免全軍覆沒；紐約被英占領達 7 年。
events.desc_en: Howe's forces routed Washington on Long Island (Aug 27, 1776); a night withdrawal saved the army. British held NYC for 7 years.

events.en: Washington Crosses Delaware · Battle of Trenton
events.desc_zh: 1776/12/25 聖誕夜 Washington 率 2400 人跨冰封 Delaware 河，次日晨突襲 Trenton 黑森傭兵，提振士氣。
events.desc_en: On Christmas night 1776, Washington led 2,400 men across the icy Delaware to surprise Hessians at Trenton, reviving morale.

events.desc_zh: 1777-78 冬，大陸軍在 Valley Forge 苦熬，飢寒 2500 人死；Steuben 操練紀律，蛻變為正規軍。
events.desc_en: The Continental Army endured winter 1777-78 at Valley Forge (~2,500 died of cold/hunger); Steuben's drills transformed them into a professional force.

events.desc_zh: 1779/6/21 西班牙對英宣戰，雖未正式承認美國，但夾擊直布羅陀、佛羅里達分散英軍兵力。
events.desc_en: Spain declared war on Britain (Jun 21, 1779); though not a formal US ally, its sieges at Gibraltar and Florida stretched British forces thin.

events.desc_zh: 1780/8/16 英將 Cornwallis 在 Camden 大敗 Gates 指揮的美軍，南方戰線告急。
events.desc_en: Cornwallis crushed Gates's Continental force at Camden (Aug 16, 1780)—a disaster for the Southern campaign.

events.desc_zh: 1781/1/17 Daniel Morgan 以雙重包圍戰術殲滅 Tarleton 部，重創英軍南方機動力量。
events.desc_en: Daniel Morgan used double envelopment at Cowpens (Jan 17, 1781) to destroy Tarleton's force, crippling British mobility in the South.

events.desc_zh: 1781/3/15 Cornwallis 雖在戰術上勝，但傷亡近 1/4，戰略失利；此後放棄 Carolinas 北上 Virginia。
events.desc_en: Cornwallis won tactically at Guilford Courthouse (Mar 15, 1781) but lost a quarter of his force; he abandoned the Carolinas for Virginia.

events.desc_zh: 1954/7/21 奠邊府戰敗後，法國與越盟簽日內瓦協議，以北緯 17 度分南北越，原定 1956 統一選舉未舉行。
events.desc_en: After Dien Bien Phu, France and Viet Minh signed Geneva Accords (Jul 21, 1954), partitioning Vietnam at the 17th parallel. A planned 1956 reunification vote never happened.

events.desc_zh: 1964/8/2 美驅逐艦 USS Maddox 與北越魚雷艇交火，8/4 第二次「事件」後證實可疑；為美擴大介入藉口。
events.desc_en: USS Maddox clashed with North Vietnamese torpedo boats on Aug 2, 1964; a disputed second 'attack' on Aug 4 was the pretext for US escalation.

events.desc_zh: 1968/1/30 越共 + 北越軍在農曆新年同時攻擊南越 100 多城鎮，軍事上失敗但動搖美國民意。
events.desc_en: Viet Cong and NVA launched coordinated attacks on 100+ South Vietnamese cities at Lunar New Year 1968—a military defeat that shattered US public support.
events.amazon_title: Vietnam: A History

events.desc_zh: 1973/1/27 美、北越、南越、越共四方簽 Paris 協定，美軍撤出；南越未停戰，2 年後淪陷。
events.desc_en: Paris Peace Accords (Jan 27, 1973) ended direct US involvement. Fighting continued in South Vietnam until its fall in 1975.

events.desc_zh: 1975/4/30 北越坦克衝進總統府，南越政府投降；越南統一於河內。美國直升機撤僑畫面成冷戰標誌。
events.desc_en: On Apr 30, 1975, NVA tanks entered the presidential palace in Saigon; South Vietnam surrendered. The US embassy helicopter evacuation became an iconic Cold War image.

events.zh: 越南民族解放陣線成立
events.desc_zh: 1960/12/20 北越支持下，南越地下武裝力量統合為「民族解放陣線」，西方稱越共（Viet Cong）。
events.desc_en: Backed by Hanoi, Southern insurgents united as the National Liberation Front on Dec 20, 1960—known in the West as Viet Cong.

events.desc_zh: 1963/11/2 南越總統吳廷琰被將軍政變推翻並殺害，美 Kennedy 政府默許；南越政局此後動盪。
events.desc_en: South Vietnamese President Ngo Dinh Diem was overthrown and killed on Nov 2, 1963, with tacit US approval. Saigon politics became unstable.

events.zh: 美軍地面部隊登陸峴港
events.en: US Marines Land at Da Nang
events.desc_zh: 1965/3/8 首批 3500 名美國海軍陸戰隊員在峴港登陸，為越戰美國地面戰鬥力量的起點。
events.desc_en: First 3,500 US Marines landed at Da Nang on Mar 8, 1965—start of major US ground combat in Vietnam.

events.zh: My Lai 美萊村大屠殺
events.desc_zh: 1968/3/16 美軍 C 連在美萊村屠殺 300-500 名越南平民；1969 年曝光，重創美國道德正當性。
events.desc_en: US Army Company C killed 300-500 Vietnamese civilians at My Lai on Mar 16, 1968. Exposed in 1969, it devastated US moral standing.

events.desc_zh: 1970/4/30 Nixon 下令美南越聯軍入侵柬埔寨打擊越共基地，引發美國校園反戰浪潮。
events.desc_en: Nixon ordered US/ARVN forces into Cambodia on Apr 30, 1970 to strike Viet Cong bases—sparking massive US campus protests.

events.desc_zh: 1972/12/18-29 美 B-52 對河內、海防進行史上最密集轟炸，迫北越返 Paris 談判桌。
events.desc_en: US B-52s bombed Hanoi/Haiphong intensively Dec 18-29, 1972, forcing North Vietnam back to the Paris negotiating table.

events.en: Last US Combat Troops Leave Vietnam
events.desc_zh: 1973/3/29 最後一批美戰鬥部隊撤離越南，僅留小批顧問與海軍陸戰隊駐館衛兵。
events.desc_en: The last US combat troops left Vietnam on Mar 29, 1973, leaving only small advisory and embassy contingents.

events.desc_zh: 1964/8/7 美國會以近全票通過東京灣決議，授權總統對越用兵，成為擴大介入法律依據。
events.desc_en: Congress passed the Gulf of Tonkin Resolution (Aug 7, 1964) nearly unanimously, authorizing the president to escalate military action.

events.zh: 芝加哥民主黨大會反戰
events.desc_zh: 1968/8 芝加哥民主黨全代會場外警察與反戰青年爆衝突，電視直播震撼全美。
events.desc_en: Outside the 1968 Democratic Convention in Chicago, police clashed with antiwar youth on live TV—shocking the nation.

events.desc_zh: 1969/6/8 Nixon 在中途島會議宣布「越南化」：將戰鬥交還南越軍，美軍逐步撤出。
events.desc_en: Nixon announced 'Vietnamization' on Jun 8, 1969: South Vietnamese forces would take over combat as US troops withdrew.

events.desc_zh: 1969/11/15 華盛頓反戰大遊行吸引 50 萬人，為美國史上最大規模反戰示威。
events.desc_en: ~500,000 protesters marched in Washington on Nov 15, 1969—the largest antiwar demonstration in US history.

events.desc_zh: 1970/5/4 俄亥俄州國民兵對 Kent State 反戰學生開槍，4 死 9 傷，觸發全國罷課。
events.desc_en: Ohio National Guard fired on Kent State antiwar students (May 4, 1970): 4 dead, 9 wounded. Triggered nationwide campus strikes.

events.desc_zh: 1971/6/13 紐約時報開始刊登 Ellsberg 洩露的五角大廈文件，揭露歷屆政府對越戰的欺瞞。
events.desc_en: The NYT began publishing Daniel Ellsberg's leaked Pentagon Papers on Jun 13, 1971, exposing government deception about Vietnam.

events.desc_zh: 1975 後南越人搭漁船逃往東南亞、澳洲、美國；1979 年達高峰，聯合國估 80 萬人。
events.desc_en: After 1975, South Vietnamese fled by boat to SE Asia, Australia, US; the exodus peaked in 1979 with UN estimates of 800,000.

events.desc_zh: 1804/12/2 Notre-Dame 大教堂，Napoleon 從教宗 Pius VII 手中奪冠自戴，象徵對神權的優越。
events.desc_en: In Notre-Dame on Dec 2, 1804, Napoleon seized the crown from Pope Pius VII and crowned himself, asserting secular supremacy.
events.amazon_title: Napoleon: A Life

events.desc_zh: 1805/10/21 Nelson 率英國艦隊在 Trafalgar 擊敗法西聯合艦隊，確立英國海上霸權百年；Nelson 中彈戰死。
events.desc_en: Nelson's British fleet crushed the Franco-Spanish fleet off Trafalgar on Oct 21, 1805; Nelson was killed, but British naval supremacy was secured for a century.

events.desc_zh: 1805/12/2 Napoleon 在 Austerlitz 同時擊敗俄奧兩皇帝，戰術經典，神聖羅馬帝國次年解體。
events.desc_en: On Dec 2, 1805 Napoleon defeated Russian and Austrian emperors simultaneously at Austerlitz—a tactical masterpiece that led to the HRE's dissolution.

events.desc_zh: 1806/10/14 Napoleon 一日擊潰普魯士軍兩路，柏林次週淪陷，Frederick 大帝的軍事遺產崩解。
events.desc_en: On Oct 14, 1806, Napoleon annihilated two Prussian armies in a single day; Berlin fell the following week.

events.desc_zh: 1807/7 Napoleon 與俄皇 Alexander I 在 Niemen 河木筏會面簽 Tilsit 條約，歐洲大陸幾乎全屬法國勢力圈。
events.desc_en: Napoleon and Tsar Alexander I met on a raft in the Niemen on Jul 7, 1807, signing the Tilsit Treaties—continental Europe became France's sphere.

events.desc_zh: 1812/6/24 Napoleon 率 60 萬大軍「Grande Armée」跨 Niemen 河攻俄，冬季撤退損失 90%，戰略轉折點。
events.desc_en: On Jun 24, 1812, Napoleon's 600,000-strong Grande Armée crossed the Niemen; winter retreat cost 90% of his force—the strategic turning point.

events.en: Battle of Leipzig (Battle of the Nations)
events.desc_zh: 1813/10/16-19 俄奧普瑞聯軍 60 萬 vs 法軍 20 萬，Napoleon 敗退萊茵河，德意志解放。
events.desc_en: The Battle of Leipzig (Oct 16-19, 1813) pitted 600,000 Allied vs 200,000 French; Napoleon's defeat liberated Germany.

events.desc_zh: 1814/4/11 Napoleon 在 Fontainebleau 無條件退位，流放地中海 Elba 島；Bourbon 王朝復辟。
events.desc_en: Napoleon abdicated unconditionally at Fontainebleau on Apr 11, 1814 and was exiled to Elba; the Bourbon monarchy was restored.

events.desc_zh: 1815/6/18 百日王朝末戰，Wellington 公爵與 Blücher 元帥聯軍在 Waterloo 擊敗 Napoleon，從此流放 St Helena。
events.desc_en: On Jun 18, 1815, Wellington and Blücher defeated Napoleon at Waterloo, ending the Hundred Days; he was exiled to St Helena.

events.desc_zh: 1803/5/18 短暫和平終結，英國對法宣戰，開啟長達 12 年的拿破崙戰爭。
events.desc_en: The brief peace of Amiens collapsed on May 18, 1803 as Britain declared war on France, starting 12 years of Napoleonic Wars.

events.desc_zh: 1805/10 Napoleon 包圍 Mack 奧軍於 Ulm，迫 3 萬人不戰而降，Trafalgar 前日完成。
events.desc_en: On Oct 20, 1805, Napoleon encircled Mack's Austrian army at Ulm, forcing 30,000 to surrender—one day before Trafalgar.

events.desc_zh: 1806/11/21 Napoleon 在柏林頒敕令，禁歐洲大陸與英貿易，開「大陸封鎖」反制英國海權。
events.desc_en: On Nov 21, 1806 in Berlin, Napoleon decreed the Continental System, banning European trade with Britain to counter British sea power.

events.desc_zh: 1807/6/14 Napoleon 在 Friedland 大敗俄軍，俄皇 Alexander I 被迫數週後與法結盟。
events.desc_en: Napoleon crushed Russian forces at Friedland on Jun 14, 1807, forcing Tsar Alexander I to ally with France weeks later at Tilsit.

events.zh: 半島戰爭·西班牙游擊消耗法軍
events.desc_zh: 1808-1814 西葡民眾與英軍（Wellington）以游擊戰消耗法軍 30 萬人，成為 Napoleon「西班牙潰瘍」。
events.desc_en: Spanish/Portuguese guerrillas + Wellington's British army drained 300,000 French troops (1808-14), dubbed Napoleon's 'Spanish ulcer'.

events.desc_zh: 1809/7/6 Napoleon 在 Wagram 以 15 萬大軍對 Charles 大公的奧軍，勝後娶奧國 Marie Louise 鞏固聯姻。
events.desc_en: At Wagram (Jul 6, 1809), Napoleon defeated Archduke Charles; he later married Austrian Marie Louise to cement the alliance.

events.desc_zh: 1812/9/7 莫斯科門前決戰，俄軍 Kutuzov 雖退但阻遲法軍補給，雙方合計 7 萬傷亡，單日戰死比例最高。
events.desc_en: On Sep 7, 1812, Kutuzov's Russians stood before Moscow; the battle cost 70,000 casualties combined—Napoleon's bloodiest single day.

events.zh: 莫斯科大撤退·Grande Armée 毀滅
events.desc_zh: Napoleon 1812/10/19 棄莫斯科，俄軍+嚴冬+游擊造成 50 萬大軍崩解，回 Niemen 僅餘 3 萬。
events.desc_en: Napoleon abandoned Moscow on Oct 19, 1812. Cossacks, winter and hunger destroyed the Grande Armée—only ~30,000 of 500,000 returned.

events.desc_zh: 1814/3/31 俄、普、奧聯軍在 Marmont 元帥倒戈下進入巴黎，Napoleon 在 Fontainebleau 被迫退位。
events.desc_en: On Mar 31, 1814, Russian/Prussian/Austrian forces entered Paris (after Marmont's defection), forcing Napoleon's abdication.

events.desc_zh: 1815/3/20 Napoleon 從 Elba 逃回巴黎復位，111 天後 Waterloo 敗退，Louis XVIII 二次復辟。
events.desc_en: Napoleon escaped Elba and retook Paris on Mar 20, 1815; after Waterloo (Jun 18), Louis XVIII was restored 111 days later (Jul 8).

events.desc_zh: 1815/10/15 Napoleon 抵大西洋 Saint Helena 島，1821/5/5 病逝（一說中毒），結束時代。
events.desc_en: Napoleon reached remote Saint Helena on Oct 15, 1815; he died there on May 5, 1821 (possibly poisoned).

events.desc_zh: 公元前 431 年春，斯巴達盟邦 Thebes 偷襲雅典盟邦 Plataea，27 年大戰開打；Thucydides 寫史見證。
events.desc_en: In spring 431 BC, Theban allies of Sparta attacked Plataea (Athens ally), starting 27 years of war—chronicled by Thucydides.
events.amazon_title: The Peloponnesian War (Kagan)

events.desc_zh: 公元前 430-426 斯巴達封城期間，瘟疫（可能為傷寒）殺死雅典 1/4 人口，Pericles 次年殉疫。
events.desc_en: During Sparta's siege (430-426 BC), a plague (possibly typhus) killed a quarter of Athens's population; Pericles died of it in 429.

events.desc_zh: 公元前 421/3 雅典 Nicias 與斯巴達簽 50 年和約，實際 6 年後即破裂；雙方互歸俘虜。
events.desc_en: In March 421 BC, Athenian Nicias and Sparta signed a 50-year peace (lasted only 6); both sides exchanged prisoners.

events.desc_zh: 公元前 415/6 雅典派 Alcibiades 率 40,000 兵 134 船遠征 Syracuse，史上最大希臘遠征軍。
events.desc_en: In June 415 BC, Athens dispatched Alcibiades with 40,000 troops on 134 ships to conquer Syracuse—the largest Greek expedition ever.

events.zh: Syracuse 慘敗·雅典艦隊全滅
events.desc_zh: 公元前 413/9 雅典遠征軍在 Syracuse 被斯巴達+Syracuse 聯軍圍殲，Nicias 處決，雅典元氣大傷。
events.desc_en: In Sep 413 BC, the Athenian expedition was annihilated at Syracuse; Nicias was executed—a catastrophic blow to Athens.

events.zh: Aegospotami 海戰·雅典海軍覆滅
events.desc_zh: 公元前 405/9 斯巴達 Lysander 在 Hellespont 突襲毀雅典艦隊 170 艘，雅典失海、糧道斷。
events.desc_en: In Sep 405 BC, Spartan Lysander surprised and destroyed Athens's 170-ship fleet at Aegospotami, cutting the grain supply.

events.zh: 雅典投降·Long Walls 拆除
events.desc_zh: 公元前 404/4 雅典飢餓投降，Lysander 命拆 Long Walls 連接 Piraeus 的城牆；Sparta 霸權建立。
events.desc_en: In April 404 BC, starving Athens surrendered; Lysander ordered the Long Walls to Piraeus torn down. Sparta's hegemony began.

events.desc_zh: 前 431 年夏，Archidamus 率斯巴達軍侵雅典周邊農田；Pericles 策略性撤居民入城牆內。
events.desc_en: In summer 431 BC, King Archidamus invaded Attica's farmland; Pericles withdrew the population within the city walls.

events.desc_zh: 前 431/430 冬 Pericles 為首批陣亡者演說，頌揚雅典民主，由 Thucydides 記錄流傳。
events.desc_en: In winter 431/430 BC, Pericles eulogized the first war dead, celebrating Athenian democracy—preserved by Thucydides.

events.desc_zh: 前 429 年秋，雅典民主領袖 Pericles 染疫而亡，之後激進民主派 Cleon 崛起，戰略趨於冒險。
events.desc_en: Pericles died of the plague in autumn 429 BC; the radical democrat Cleon rose, pushing riskier strategies.

events.desc_zh: 前 425 雅典 Demosthenes 在 Pylos 設防，圍困 Sphacteria 島斯巴達 420 精銳，俘 292 人震驚希臘。
events.desc_en: In 425 BC at Pylos, Demosthenes trapped 420 Spartan elites on Sphacteria; capturing 292 shocked Greece (Spartans never surrendered).

events.desc_zh: 前 422 斯巴達 Brasidas 在 Amphipolis 大敗雅典軍，雙方主戰領袖 Brasidas / Cleon 同時陣亡，促 Nicias 和約。
events.desc_en: In 422 BC at Amphipolis, Spartan Brasidas defeated Athens; both hawks Brasidas and Cleon died, paving way for Peace of Nicias.

events.desc_zh: 前 415 Alcibiades 被雅典以褻瀆神像罪召回，途中叛逃斯巴達，獻計 Decelea 設常駐要塞困雅典。
events.desc_en: Recalled to Athens on impiety charges, Alcibiades defected to Sparta (415 BC); he advised fortifying Decelea to squeeze Athens.

events.desc_zh: 前 411/6 雅典寡頭派發動政變推翻民主 4 個月，後被激進民主派反撲，短暫「五千人」過渡政權。
events.desc_en: In June 411 BC, oligarchs overthrew Athenian democracy for 4 months before moderate 'Five Thousand' restored limited democracy.

events.zh: Cyzicus 海戰·雅典短暫復甦
events.desc_zh: 前 410 Alcibiades 復出率雅典艦隊在 Cyzicus 殲斯巴達艦隊，短暫復興雅典海權。
events.desc_en: Alcibiades returned and led Athens's fleet to annihilate the Spartan navy at Cyzicus (410 BC), briefly reviving Athenian sea power.

events.desc_zh: 前 406/8 雅典慘勝斯巴達後，未救海難中的水手，歸國後 6 位將軍被民眾處決，元氣大傷。
events.desc_en: After a Pyrrhic victory at Arginusae (406 BC), 6 Athenian generals were executed for failing to rescue survivors—a self-inflicted wound.

events.desc_zh: 前 404 戰敗後斯巴達扶持 Critias 等「三十暴君」統治雅典 8 個月，殺 1500 人；次年民主派反撲推翻。
events.desc_en: After defeat, Sparta installed Critias and 29 others as 'Thirty Tyrants' (404 BC); they killed 1,500 before democracy was restored in 403.

events.desc_zh: 公元前 264 Rome 派兵援 Messana 的 Mamertines 傭兵團，介入西西里，引爆與 Carthage 的 23 年首次布匿戰爭。
events.desc_en: In 264 BC, Rome intervened in Sicily to help the Mamertines at Messana, triggering a 23-year war with Carthage.
events.amazon_title: The Fall of Carthage

events.zh: 第一次結束·西西里割 Rome
events.desc_zh: 前 241 Aegates 海戰後 Carthage 求和，簽 Lutatius 條約割西西里給 Rome，賠款 3,200 Talents。
events.desc_en: After Aegates (241 BC), Carthage sued for peace—the Treaty of Lutatius ceded Sicily to Rome with an indemnity of 3,200 talents.

events.desc_zh: 前 218/10 Hannibal 率 4 萬步兵、37 戰象翻越 Alps 入義大利，軍史奇蹟，開啟第二次布匿戰爭。
events.desc_en: In October 218 BC, Hannibal crossed the Alps with 40,000 infantry and 37 war elephants—a military miracle—starting the Second Punic War.

events.desc_zh: 前 202/10 Scipio Africanus 在 Zama 以騎兵戰術擊敗 Hannibal，結束第二次布匿戰爭。
events.desc_en: At Zama (Oct 202 BC), Scipio Africanus defeated Hannibal using cavalry tactics, ending the Second Punic War.

events.zh: 第二次結束·Carthage 巨額賠款
events.desc_zh: 前 201 Carthage 簽和，交艦隊、賠款 10,000 Talents、限未經 Rome 許可不得對外戰，降為從屬。
events.desc_en: In 201 BC, Carthage surrendered its fleet, paid 10,000 talents, and agreed not to wage war without Rome's permission—becoming a client.

events.zh: 第三次爆發·Cato 的「Carthago delenda est」
events.desc_zh: 前 149 Cato the Elder 於每次演說結尾必言「迦太基必須毀滅」，Rome 終以 Carthage 違約反 Numidia 為藉口宣戰。
events.desc_en: After Cato the Elder ended every speech with 'Carthago delenda est', Rome declared war in 149 BC using Carthage's response to Numidia as pretext.

events.zh: Mylae 海戰·羅馬首勝海戰
events.desc_zh: 前 260 Duilius 率羅馬初建艦隊配「corvus」跳板登舷戰術，在 Mylae 首次海戰勝 Carthage。
events.desc_en: In 260 BC, Duilius led Rome's young navy (using 'corvus' boarding bridges) to its first naval victory over Carthage at Mylae.

events.zh: Ecnomus·史上最大古代海戰之一
events.desc_zh: 前 256 雙方合計 680 艘戰船、近 30 萬水手，Rome 勝後登陸北非。
events.desc_en: In 256 BC, 680 ships and ~290,000 sailors clashed off Ecnomus—one of antiquity's largest naval battles. Rome won and invaded North Africa.

events.desc_zh: 前 255 羅馬執政 Regulus 登陸北非初勝，談判被拒後被 Xanthippus 指揮的 Carthage 軍擊潰俘虜。
events.desc_en: In 255 BC, Consul Regulus invaded North Africa; after refusing Carthage's terms, he was captured by Xanthippus's Carthaginian army.

events.desc_zh: 前 241/3 Lutatius 率羅馬新艦隊在 Aegates 殲 Carthage 船團，逼 Carthage 求和終結 23 年戰爭。
events.desc_en: In March 241 BC, Lutatius's new Roman fleet destroyed Carthage's at the Aegates Islands, forcing peace and ending the 23-year war.

events.desc_zh: 前 219/8 Hannibal 圍攻 Rome 盟城 Saguntum 長達 8 個月破城，Rome 次年對 Carthage 宣戰。
events.desc_en: Hannibal besieged Rome's ally Saguntum for 8 months (219 BC); Rome declared war on Carthage the next year.

events.desc_zh: 前 218/12 Hannibal 誘羅馬軍渡冰冷 Trebia 河後設伏，殲 4 萬羅馬軍，入義大利首勝。
events.desc_en: In December 218 BC, Hannibal lured Romans across the freezing Trebia and ambushed them, destroying 40,000 troops.

events.desc_zh: 前 217/6 Hannibal 在 Trasimene 湖岸霧中伏擊 Flaminius 率羅馬軍，1.5 萬全殲，1.5 萬俘。
events.desc_en: In June 217 BC, Hannibal ambushed Flaminius in fog by Lake Trasimene; 15,000 Romans killed and 15,000 captured.

events.desc_zh: 前 212 Marcellus 攻破 Syracuse，Archimedes 雖設計多種防禦武器，仍在城破時被羅馬兵所殺。
events.desc_en: In 212 BC, Marcellus took Syracuse; despite Archimedes's defensive inventions, he was killed by a Roman soldier.

events.zh: Capua 奪回·Rome 轉守為攻
events.desc_zh: 前 211 Rome 收復叛變盟邦 Capua，Hannibal 南義大利勢力瓦解，戰局逆轉。
events.desc_en: Rome recovered Capua (which had defected to Hannibal) in 211 BC, collapsing Hannibal's position in southern Italy.

events.desc_zh: 前 149 Rome 在 Cato 鼓吹下對 Carthage 宣戰；Carthage 交質出武器後 Rome 仍要求拆城遷移，拒絕後圍城。
events.desc_en: In 149 BC, Rome declared war; despite Carthage surrendering weapons and hostages, Rome demanded the city be relocated—refused, siege began.

events.desc_zh: 前 147 Scipio Aemilianus（Africanus 養孫）任執政官，接指揮圍城嚴密推進，次年破城。
events.desc_en: In 147 BC, Scipio Aemilianus (adopted grandson of Africanus) was elected consul, tightened the siege, and took Carthage next year.

events.zh: 布拉格擲窗事件·戰爭起因
events.desc_zh: 1618/5/23 波希米亞新教徒貴族將三名皇帝代表扔出布拉格城堡窗外，引爆三十年戰爭。
events.desc_en: On May 23, 1618, Bohemian Protestant nobles threw three imperial officials from a Prague Castle window—sparking the Thirty Years War.
events.amazon_title: Europe's Tragedy: A History of the Thirty Years War

events.zh: 白山戰役·波希米亞覆滅
events.desc_zh: 1620/11/8 帝國+天主教聯盟軍在布拉格城外 White Mountain 僅 2 小時擊敗 Frederick V 新教軍，波希米亞戰役結束。
events.desc_en: On Nov 8, 1620, Imperial/Catholic forces crushed Frederick V's Protestants in 2 hours at White Mountain outside Prague.

events.desc_zh: 1625 春丹麥 Christian IV 率新教軍南下德意志北部，替新教挽回局面；4 年後大敗退出。
events.desc_en: In spring 1625, Denmark's Christian IV entered the war to defend Protestants in northern Germany; he was routed within 4 years.

events.zh: Gustavus Adolphus 登陸波美拉尼亞
events.desc_zh: 1630/7/6 瑞典王 Gustavus Adolphus 在法國財援下登陸波美拉尼亞，轉戰局為新教優勢。
events.desc_en: On Jul 6, 1630, Swedish King Gustavus Adolphus landed in Pomerania with French funding, reversing the war's momentum for Protestants.

events.desc_zh: 1631/9/17 Gustavus Adolphus 以線形戰術大勝 Tilly 元帥的帝國軍，扭轉戰局，新教轉守為攻。
events.desc_en: On Sep 17, 1631, Gustavus Adolphus used linear tactics to crush Tilly's Imperial army at Breitenfeld—the Protestant turning point.

events.desc_zh: 1632/11/16 Gustavus Adolphus 在 Lützen 霧中衝鋒陷入敵陣戰死，雖瑞典取勝但失去關鍵領袖。
events.desc_en: On Nov 16, 1632, Gustavus Adolphus died charging through fog at Lützen; Sweden won the field but lost its irreplaceable king.

events.zh: 法國參戰·戰爭非宗教化
events.desc_zh: 1635/5/19 Richelieu 主導天主教法國對天主教西班牙/帝國宣戰，戰爭從宗教衝突轉為歐洲霸權爭奪。
events.desc_en: On May 19, 1635, Catholic France (under Richelieu) declared war on Catholic Spain/Empire—the war became a contest for European supremacy.

events.desc_zh: 1643/5/19 21 歲的 Condé 親王率法軍在 Rocroi 擊潰西班牙 tercios 方陣，象徵西班牙霸權終結。
events.desc_en: On May 19, 1643, 21-year-old Prince de Condé crushed the Spanish tercios at Rocroi—symbolizing the end of Spanish military supremacy.

events.zh: Westphalia 和約·近代主權國家體系
events.desc_zh: 1648/10/24 Münster + Osnabrück 兩地同時簽和，確立國家主權、荷瑞獨立、神聖羅馬帝國架空，近代國際法起點。
events.desc_en: Signed Oct 24, 1648 at Münster/Osnabrück, the Peace established state sovereignty, recognized Dutch/Swiss independence, and founded modern international law.

events.desc_zh: 1618-1620 波希米亞新教貴族廢 Ferdinand II、選 Frederick V 為王，直到 White Mountain 慘敗。
events.desc_en: Bohemian Protestants deposed Ferdinand II and elected Frederick V (1618-1620) until the disaster at White Mountain.

events.desc_zh: 1619/8/26 波希米亞議會廢 Ferdinand 選 Palatinate 的 Frederick V 為王；僅在位一冬即敗故稱「冬王」。
events.desc_en: On Aug 26, 1619, the Bohemian Diet elected Frederick V of the Palatinate; his reign lasted only one winter—hence 'Winter King'.

events.desc_zh: 1621-1626 Ernst von Mansfeld 率新教雇傭軍在 Rhineland 與 Netherlands 邊境游擊，無固定主君。
events.desc_en: From 1621, Ernst von Mansfeld led Protestant mercenaries across the Rhineland and Netherlands with no fixed master.

events.zh: Lutter·丹麥 Christian IV 慘敗
events.desc_zh: 1626/8/27 帝國元帥 Tilly 在 Lutter 擊敗丹麥 Christian IV，迫其退守北方；1629 退出戰爭。
events.desc_en: On Aug 27, 1626, Imperial marshal Tilly crushed Denmark's Christian IV at Lutter, forcing him to retreat north; Denmark left the war in 1629.

events.desc_zh: 1629/3/6 Ferdinand II 命所有 1552 後新教取得的教會財產歸還天主教，激化新教反彈，吸引瑞典介入。
events.desc_en: On Mar 6, 1629, Ferdinand II ordered all church property acquired by Protestants since 1552 returned—radicalizing the Protestants and drawing Sweden in.

events.desc_zh: 1631/5/20 Tilly 率帝國軍攻破 Magdeburg 新教大城，3 萬居民被屠殺、城焚；為戰爭最惡名昭彰的暴行。
events.desc_en: On May 20, 1631, Tilly's forces sacked Magdeburg; 30,000 civilians were slaughtered and the city burned—the war's most infamous atrocity.

events.desc_zh: 1634/2/25 帝國總司令 Wallenstein 因疑叛變被 Ferdinand II 派部下刺殺於 Cheb，結束其影響。
events.desc_en: On Feb 25, 1634, Imperial generalissimo Wallenstein was assassinated at Cheb on Ferdinand II's orders over suspicions of treason.

events.desc_zh: 1634/9/6 西班牙+帝國聯軍在 Nördlingen 大勝瑞典-德意志聯軍，瑞典南德勢力瓦解，促法國翌年介入。
events.desc_en: On Sep 6, 1634, Spanish/Imperial forces crushed Swedish/German allies at Nördlingen, collapsing Sweden's south German position—and bringing France in.

events.zh: Prague 和約·帝國統一嘗試
events.desc_zh: 1635/5/30 Ferdinand II 與薩克森等帝國諸侯簽和，取消 Restitution 敕令，多數新教諸侯歸服；法國次日參戰破局。
events.desc_en: On May 30, 1635, Ferdinand II made peace with Saxony et al., suspending the Edict of Restitution; France's entry days later broke the deal.

events.zh: Corbie 危機·西軍兵臨巴黎
events.desc_zh: 1636/8 西班牙-帝國聯軍突襲法國北部奪 Corbie，兵臨巴黎 50 公里；Richelieu 動員守城，翌月反攻收復。
events.desc_en: In August 1636, Spanish/Imperial forces captured Corbie, threatening Paris from 50 km; Richelieu mobilized defense and recaptured it weeks later.

events.desc_zh: 1637/2/15 Ferdinand II 病逝，子 Ferdinand III 繼位；較務實，為 Westphalia 談判鋪路。
events.desc_en: Ferdinand II died Feb 15, 1637; his pragmatic son Ferdinand III succeeded him, eventually opening the door to the Westphalian negotiations.

events.zh: 布蘭登堡退出反帝陣營
events.desc_zh: 1641/8 新任布蘭登堡選侯 Frederick William「大選侯」與瑞典簽停戰，退出反帝戰爭，種未來普魯士崛起。
events.desc_en: In Aug 1641, the new Elector of Brandenburg, 'the Great Elector' Frederick William, signed a truce with Sweden—seeding future Prussia.

events.desc_zh: 1642/11/2 瑞典 Torstensson 於 Breitenfeld 再勝帝國軍，重振瑞典攻勢。
events.desc_en: On Nov 2, 1642, Swedish Torstensson again triumphed at Breitenfeld, reviving the Swedish offensive.

events.desc_zh: 1645/3/6 瑞典 Torstensson 在 Jankau 全殲帝國軍主力，進迫維也納；帝國無力再戰。
events.desc_en: On Mar 6, 1645, Sweden's Torstensson annihilated the Imperial main force at Jankau and threatened Vienna—the Empire could no longer fight on.

events.desc_zh: 1644-1648 歐洲百餘外交官在 Münster（天主教陣營）和 Osnabrück（新教陣營）同時談判 4 年，達成 Westphalia。
events.desc_en: From 1644-1648, over 100 European diplomats negotiated simultaneously at Münster and Osnabrück for 4 years, producing the Peace of Westphalia.

events.desc_zh: 1648/5/17 瑞法聯軍在 Zusmarshausen 擊敗帝國軍，為三十年戰爭最後大型戰役；4 個月後簽和。
events.desc_en: On May 17, 1648, Swedish/French forces defeated Imperial troops at Zusmarshausen—the war's last major battle; peace was signed 4 months later.

events.desc_zh: 1756/5/17 英國正式對法宣戰，起因於北美俄亥俄河谷衝突與歐陸聯盟重組，七年戰爭開啟。
events.desc_en: On May 17, 1756, Britain formally declared war on France over Ohio Valley clashes and reshuffled European alliances—beginning the Seven Years' War.
events.amazon_title: Crucible of War

events.zh: Frederick 入侵薩克森·先制攻擊
events.desc_zh: 1756/8/29 Frederick II 不宣而戰侵薩克森，搶先攻擊奧法俄聯盟，開啟歐陸戰場。
events.desc_en: On Aug 29, 1756, Frederick II invaded Saxony without declaration, pre-empting the Austro-French-Russian alliance and opening the Continental war.

events.desc_zh: 1757/11/5 Frederick 以 2.2 萬兵在 Rossbach 僅 1.5 小時擊潰 4.2 萬法奧聯軍，機動作戰典範。
events.desc_en: On Nov 5, 1757, Frederick with 22,000 crushed 42,000 Franco-Imperial forces at Rossbach in 1.5 hours—a classic of maneuver warfare.

events.desc_zh: 1757/12/5 Frederick 以斜線戰術（oblique order）在 Leuthen 大勝奧軍；Napoleon 譽為「戰術經典」。
events.desc_en: On Dec 5, 1757, Frederick used the 'oblique order' to crush the Austrians at Leuthen; Napoleon called it a tactical masterpiece.

events.desc_zh: 1759 英國一年連勝：Minden（8）、Lagos（8）、Quebec（9）、Quiberon Bay（11），奠大英帝國全球霸權。
events.desc_en: 1759 saw Britain win at Minden (Aug), Lagos (Aug), Quebec (Sep), and Quiberon Bay (Nov)—securing global British supremacy.

events.en: Battle of the Plains of Abraham
events.desc_zh: 1759/9/13 Wolfe 將軍夜攀 Quebec 峭壁，在 Plains of Abraham 擊敗 Montcalm，雙方將領皆陣亡；新法蘭西覆滅。
events.desc_en: On Sep 13, 1759, Wolfe's British scaled the Quebec cliffs and defeated Montcalm on the Plains of Abraham; both generals died—New France fell.

events.en: Miracle of the House of Brandenburg
events.desc_zh: 1762/1/5 俄皇 Elizabeth 死，Peter III 繼位，因崇拜 Frederick II 立即停戰退盟，救 Prussia 於覆亡邊緣。
events.desc_en: On Jan 5, 1762, Empress Elizabeth died; new tsar Peter III, a Frederick II fanboy, immediately withdrew Russia from the war, saving Prussia.

events.desc_zh: 1763/2/10 Paris 和約（英法西）+2/15 Hubertusburg（普奧）：英奪加拿大與印度、Prussia 保 Silesia。
events.desc_en: Treaty of Paris (Feb 10, 1763, Britain/France/Spain) + Hubertusburg (Feb 15, Prussia/Austria): Britain took Canada and India; Prussia kept Silesia.

events.desc_zh: 1756/5 Kaunitz 主導奧地利 Maria Theresa 與世仇法國 Louis XV 結盟，對抗新結盟的英普；翻轉百年歐洲陣營。
events.desc_en: In May 1756, Kaunitz orchestrated an Austro-French alliance (vs traditional rivalries) against the new Anglo-Prussian pact—reversing a century of alignments.

events.desc_zh: 1756/10/1 Frederick 在 Lobositz 勝奧軍，使薩克森軍 17,000 人被迫投降，歐陸戰場首戰勝。
events.desc_en: On Oct 1, 1756, Frederick defeated Austria at Lobositz, forcing 17,000 Saxon troops to surrender—the first battle of the Continental war.

events.desc_zh: 1757/6/18 奧地利 Daun 在 Kolín 擊敗 Frederick，為普軍首次重大敗仗，迫退出 Bohemia。
events.desc_en: On Jun 18, 1757, Austrian Daun defeated Frederick at Kolín—Prussia's first major defeat—forcing withdrawal from Bohemia.

events.desc_zh: 1758/8/25 Frederick 與俄軍 Fermor 在 Zorndorf 互相重創，雙方合計 3 萬傷亡，戰術無決定性結果。
events.desc_en: On Aug 25, 1758, Frederick and Russian Fermor mauled each other at Zorndorf; 30,000 total casualties, no decisive result.

events.desc_zh: 1759/8/12 俄奧聯軍在 Kunersdorf 大敗 Frederick，他親率衝鋒險死，絕望寫信欲自殺；普魯士瀕覆。
events.desc_en: On Aug 12, 1759, Russo-Austrian forces crushed Frederick at Kunersdorf; he personally led cavalry charges and despairingly considered suicide.

events.desc_zh: 1760-1762 普奧在 Silesia 與薩克森反覆拉鋸，Frederick 以少對多勉強守住東德領土。
events.desc_en: From 1760-1762, Prussia and Austria traded blows in Silesia and Saxony; Frederick held eastern territories against overwhelming odds.

events.desc_zh: 1762/7/21 Frederick 在 Burkersdorf 小勝奧軍，鞏固 Silesia；俄國退盟後普軍得以集中兵力。
events.desc_en: On Jul 21, 1762, Frederick's small victory at Burkersdorf consolidated Silesia after Russia's exit from the war.

events.desc_zh: 1755/7/9 英將 Braddock 率軍攻法國 Duquesne 堡，途中遭法印伏擊慘敗、Braddock 戰死；Washington 初露鋒芒。
events.desc_en: On Jul 9, 1755, British Gen. Braddock was ambushed by French/Indian forces marching on Fort Duquesne; Braddock died, and young Washington gained his first fame.

events.zh: Plassey·Clive 奪孟加拉·英印度起點
events.desc_zh: 1757/6/23 Robert Clive 以 3 千英軍+印度兵擊敗孟加拉 Siraj ud-Daulah 5 萬聯軍，奠定英國在印度霸權。
events.desc_en: On Jun 23, 1757, Robert Clive with 3,000 men defeated Bengal's Siraj ud-Daulah and 50,000 allies at Plassey—founding British India.

events.desc_zh: 1758/6-7 Amherst 率英軍 4 萬圍法屬 Cape Breton 的 Louisbourg 堡 7 週破城，開路攻 Quebec。
events.desc_en: From Jun-Jul 1758, Amherst's 40,000 British troops besieged and took French Louisbourg on Cape Breton, opening the way to Quebec.

events.desc_zh: 1759/6-9 Wolfe 率英軍封鎖 Quebec 3 個月，9/13 登峭壁決戰 Plains of Abraham 後 5 日 Quebec 投降。
events.desc_en: From Jun-Sep 1759, Wolfe besieged Quebec for 3 months; 5 days after the Plains of Abraham victory (Sep 13), Quebec surrendered.

events.desc_zh: 1760/9/8 Vaudreuil 總督向 Amherst 投降 Montreal，法屬北美全境結束；加拿大落入英國。
events.desc_en: On Sep 8, 1760, Governor Vaudreuil surrendered Montreal to Amherst, ending French North America; Canada passed to Britain.

events.desc_zh: 1762/8/14 英軍破 Havana 要塞，奪西班牙加勒比重鎮，和約時換回 Florida。
events.desc_en: On Aug 14, 1762, British forces captured Havana from Spain; Britain later exchanged it for Florida in the peace treaty.

events.desc_zh: 1762/10/5 英軍奪菲律賓 Manila，短暫佔領約 20 個月，和約交還西班牙。
events.desc_en: On Oct 5, 1762, British forces captured Manila; they held it for ~20 months before returning it to Spain at the peace.

events.zh: Urban II 在 Clermont 號召
events.en: Council of Clermont · Urban II's Call
events.desc_zh: 1095/11/27 教宗 Urban II 在 Clermont 公會呼籲武裝朝聖，解救拜占庭與耶路撒冷；群眾齊呼「Deus vult」。
events.desc_en: On Nov 27, 1095 at Clermont, Pope Urban II called for armed pilgrimage to aid Byzantium and recover Jerusalem; the crowd shouted 'Deus vult!'
events.amazon_title: The Crusades: The Authoritative History

events.zh: 第一次十字軍奪耶路撒冷
events.desc_zh: 1099/7/15 十字軍破耶路撒冷城牆，屠穆斯林與猶太居民數千人；建 Kingdom of Jerusalem。
events.desc_en: On Jul 15, 1099, Crusaders breached Jerusalem's walls and massacred thousands of Muslims and Jews; the Kingdom of Jerusalem was established.

events.zh: 第二次十字軍·Bernard 鼓吹慘敗
events.desc_zh: 1147 Bernard of Clairvaux 鼓吹下，法王 Louis VII + 德王 Conrad III 率軍東征，失敗於 Damascus。
events.desc_en: In 1147, Bernard of Clairvaux inspired French King Louis VII and German King Conrad III to lead the Second Crusade—which failed at Damascus.

events.desc_zh: 1187/7/4 Saladin 在 Horns of Hattin 利用渴水戰術殲十字軍主力，俘 Guy 王，True Cross 遺失。
events.desc_en: On Jul 4, 1187, Saladin annihilated the Crusader army at the Horns of Hattin using dehydration tactics; King Guy was captured and the True Cross lost.

events.desc_zh: 1187/10/2 Hattin 後 3 個月，Saladin 圍耶路撒冷，Balian 談判後和平交城，禁止屠殺，對比 1099 形成鮮明。
events.desc_en: On Oct 2, 1187, Saladin took Jerusalem after negotiating with Balian; no massacre—a sharp contrast to 1099.

events.zh: 第三次十字軍·三王遠征
events.desc_zh: 1189 Barbarossa（1190 溺死）、Philip II、Richard I 同時東征；Richard 奪 Acre 但未取耶路撒冷，談和撤退。
events.desc_en: In 1189, Barbarossa (drowned 1190), Philip II, and Richard I led the Kings' Crusade; Richard retook Acre but failed at Jerusalem, ending in truce.

events.desc_zh: 1204/4/12 威尼斯操縱下第四次十字軍改道攻拜占庭首都，洗劫 3 日，建 Latin Empire；東正教與天主教裂痕加深。
events.desc_en: On Apr 12, 1204, the Fourth Crusade (diverted by Venice) sacked Byzantine Constantinople for 3 days and set up the Latin Empire—widening the East-West schism.

events.zh: Frederick II 外交收復耶路撒冷
events.desc_zh: 1229/2/18 神聖羅馬皇帝 Frederick II 與 Ayyubid Sultan al-Kamil 簽 Jaffa 條約，和平收復耶路撒冷 15 年。
events.desc_en: On Feb 18, 1229, Emperor Frederick II negotiated the Treaty of Jaffa with Sultan al-Kamil, peacefully recovering Jerusalem for 15 years.

events.zh: 第七次·Louis IX 埃及遠征
events.en: Seventh Crusade · Louis IX to Egypt
events.desc_zh: 1248 法王 Louis IX 率軍遠征埃及，1249 奪 Damietta 但 1250 在 Fariskur 戰敗被俘，贖金 40 萬 livres。
events.desc_en: In 1248, French King Louis IX led the Seventh Crusade to Egypt; he took Damietta (1249) but was defeated and captured at Fariskur (1250), ransomed for 400,000 livres.

events.desc_zh: 1291/5/18 Mamluk Sultan al-Ashraf Khalil 攻破 Acre，十字軍最後據點；終結近 2 世紀十字軍在東方統治。
events.desc_en: On May 18, 1291, Mamluk Sultan al-Ashraf Khalil stormed Acre, the last Crusader stronghold—ending nearly 2 centuries of Latin rule in the East.

events.desc_zh: 1096/4 隱士 Peter 率 4 萬農民朝聖東進，途中屠殺 Rhineland 猶太社區；10 月在 Civetot 被塞爾柱軍全殲。
events.desc_en: From April 1096, Peter the Hermit led 40,000 peasants east, massacring Rhineland Jews along the way; annihilated by Seljuks at Civetot in October.

events.desc_zh: 1097/10-1098/6 十字軍圍 Antioch 8 個月，守軍反圍攻再以「Holy Lance」精神勝，開路入敘利亞。
events.desc_en: From Oct 1097 to Jun 1098, the Crusaders besieged Antioch for 8 months; they were then besieged themselves until an inspired sally behind the 'Holy Lance' broke through.

events.desc_zh: 1099/6/7-7/15 十字軍圍 Jerusalem 5 週，缺水情況下建攻城塔登城，7/15 破門；屠城次日。
events.desc_en: From Jun 7 to Jul 15, 1099, Crusaders besieged Jerusalem for 5 weeks, built siege towers despite water shortage, and breached on Jul 15; massacre followed.

events.desc_zh: 1099-1291 十字軍在黎凡特建 4 國：Jerusalem、Antioch、Edessa、Tripoli；存續 192 年直至 Acre 陷落。
events.desc_en: From 1099 to 1291, Crusaders ruled 4 states in the Levant: Jerusalem, Antioch, Edessa, Tripoli—lasting 192 years until Acre fell.

events.desc_zh: 1119 Hugh de Payens 在 Jerusalem 創立聖殿騎士團保護朝聖者，成為中世紀最富軍事修道會。
events.desc_en: In 1119, Hugh de Payens founded the Knights Templar in Jerusalem to protect pilgrims—later the wealthiest medieval military order.

events.desc_zh: 1144/12/24 Zengi 攻破十字軍 Edessa 伯國，為十字軍 45 年內首個失國，觸發第二次十字軍。
events.desc_en: On Dec 24, 1144, Zengi captured the Crusader County of Edessa—the first Crusader state to fall, sparking the Second Crusade.

events.zh: Damascus 圍城失敗·第二次終
events.desc_zh: 1148/7/24-28 第二次十字軍圍 Damascus 僅 4 日即撤退，Louis VII + Conrad III 無功而返，慘敗告終。
events.desc_en: From Jul 24-28, 1148, the Second Crusade besieged Damascus only 4 days before retreating; Louis VII and Conrad III returned empty-handed.

events.desc_zh: 1204-1261 第四次十字軍建拉丁帝國取代拜占庭，存續 57 年；Michael VIII 於 1261 光復 Constantinople。
events.desc_en: From 1204-1261, the Fourth Crusade's Latin Empire replaced Byzantium for 57 years; Michael VIII retook Constantinople in 1261.

events.desc_zh: 1219/11/5 第五次十字軍圍 18 個月後奪埃及 Damietta；教廷拒 Sultan al-Kamil 交還耶路撒冷的和約，軍隊 1221 撤退。
events.desc_en: On Nov 5, 1219, the Fifth Crusade took Damietta after 18 months; the papal legate rejected Sultan al-Kamil's offer of Jerusalem; forces retreated in 1221.

events.desc_zh: 1244/7/11 逃難的 Khwarezm 突厥人在 Mamluk 協助下攻陷耶路撒冷，大屠城；基督教再未真正統治聖城。
events.desc_en: On Jul 11, 1244, displaced Khwarezmian Turks (with Mamluk aid) sacked Jerusalem and massacred its residents—Christians never truly ruled it again.

events.zh: 第七次·Louis IX 再奪 Damietta
events.desc_zh: 1249/6/6 Louis IX 率法軍登陸埃及，輕取 Damietta；次年兵敗 Fariskur 被俘，贖金震驚法國財政。
events.desc_en: On Jun 6, 1249, Louis IX's French forces landed in Egypt and easily took Damietta; they were defeated at Fariskur the next year.

events.desc_zh: 1250/4/6 Louis IX 率軍在 Fariskur 被 Mamluk 軍大敗並俘虜，贖金高達法國年收入 1/3。
events.desc_en: On Apr 6, 1250, Louis IX was defeated and captured by Mamluks at Fariskur; his ransom equaled one-third of France's annual revenue.

events.desc_zh: 1268/5/19 Mamluk Sultan Baibars 攻破 Antioch 城，屠城，建 170 年的 Antioch 公國覆滅。
events.desc_en: On May 19, 1268, Mamluk Sultan Baibars stormed Antioch and massacred its population—ending the 170-year-old Principality of Antioch.

events.zh: 第八次·Louis IX 死於 Tunis
events.desc_zh: 1270/8/25 Louis IX 率第八次十字軍登陸突尼斯，染瘟疫病死於營中，十字軍隨之撤退。
events.desc_en: On Aug 25, 1270, Louis IX died of dysentery in his camp at Tunis during the Eighth Crusade; the army withdrew.

events.zh: 第九次·Edward 小規模遠征
events.desc_zh: 1271 英格蘭王子 Edward（後 Edward I）率小軍抵 Acre 短暫防禦，1272 父死歸國繼位；公認最後一次東方十字軍。
events.desc_en: In 1271, English Prince Edward (later Edward I) led a small force to defend Acre; he returned in 1272 to take the throne. Considered the last major Levantine crusade.

events.desc_zh: 1289/4/27 Mamluk Sultan Qalawun 攻破 Tripoli 伯國首府，為 Acre 陷前倒數第二個 Outremer 據點。
events.desc_en: On Apr 27, 1289, Mamluk Sultan Qalawun captured Tripoli, the County's capital—the second-to-last Outremer stronghold before Acre.

events.desc_zh: 1291/4/6-5/18 Mamluk al-Ashraf Khalil 率 20 萬圍 Acre，6 週破城；拉丁東方正式終。
events.desc_en: From Apr 6 to May 18, 1291, Mamluk al-Ashraf Khalil besieged Acre with 200,000 troops, taking it in 6 weeks—ending Latin presence in the East.

events.desc_zh: 1914/9/6-12 法軍 Joffre 在 Marne 河阻德軍推進，巴黎動員計程車運兵，Schlieffen 計畫破滅。
events.desc_en: From Sep 6-12, 1914, Joffre halted the German advance at the Marne; Parisian taxis ferried troops, shattering the Schlieffen Plan.

events.desc_zh: 1915/4-1916/1 英澳紐聯軍登陸加里波利半島圍鄂圖曼失敗，11.5 萬聯軍傷亡；ANZAC 民族認同起源。
events.desc_en: From Apr 1915 to Jan 1916, British/ANZAC forces failed to capture Gallipoli from Ottomans; 115,000 casualties—the birth of ANZAC identity.

events.desc_zh: 1918/1/8 Wilson 在國會演講提 14 點和平原則：民族自決、公開外交、國際聯盟等，定戰後秩序基調。
events.desc_en: On Jan 8, 1918, Wilson addressed Congress with 14 points (self-determination, open diplomacy, League of Nations), shaping the postwar order.

events.desc_zh: 1919/6/28 Sarajevo 刺殺 5 週年，德於 Versailles 鏡廳簽屈辱條約：失 13% 領土、付賠款、限軍；埋二戰禍根。
events.desc_en: On Jun 28, 1919 (5 years after Sarajevo), Germany signed the harsh Versailles Treaty in the Hall of Mirrors: 13% territory lost, reparations, army limits—seeding WWII.

events.zh: 大西洋憲章·戰後秩序原則
events.desc_zh: 1941/8/14 Roosevelt 與 Churchill 在 Newfoundland 外海會面，聯合聲明戰後自由貿易、民族自決等 8 原則。
events.desc_en: On Aug 14, 1941, Roosevelt and Churchill met off Newfoundland and issued 8 principles for the postwar world—free trade, self-determination, etc.

events.zh: Bretton Woods 體系·戰後金融秩序
events.desc_zh: 1944/7/22 44 國在新罕布夏 Bretton Woods 建立 IMF + 世銀，美元釘金本位制，奠戰後國際貨幣秩序近 30 年。
events.desc_en: On Jul 22, 1944, 44 nations at Bretton Woods, NH established the IMF and World Bank; the dollar-gold standard anchored global finance for ~30 years.

events.zh: Casablanca 會議·無條件投降政策
events.desc_zh: 1943/1/14-24 Roosevelt + Churchill 在 Casablanca 會晤，決策要求軸心國「無條件投降」（unconditional surrender）。
events.desc_en: From Jan 14-24, 1943, Roosevelt and Churchill met at Casablanca and adopted the policy of demanding 'unconditional surrender' of the Axis.

events.desc_zh: 1944/6/6 Eisenhower 指揮 15 萬聯軍登陸諾曼底 5 灘頭，開歐洲第二戰線，納粹西線開始崩潰。
events.desc_en: On Jun 6, 1944, Eisenhower commanded 150,000 Allied troops landing on 5 Normandy beaches, opening the second front in Europe.

events.desc_zh: 1945/5/8 納粹德國在 Reims 與柏林雙簽無條件投降，歐戰結束，歐洲各大城同日慶祝勝利。
events.desc_en: On May 8, 1945, Nazi Germany signed unconditional surrender at Reims and Berlin; Europe erupted in VE-Day celebrations.

events.zh: 遠東國際軍事法庭·東京審判
events.desc_zh: 1946/5-1948/11 遠東國際軍事法庭審 28 名日本戰犯，7 人絞（Tojo 等）、18 終身。裕仁天皇未被起訴。
events.desc_en: From May 1946 to Nov 1948, the Tokyo Tribunal tried 28 Japanese war criminals; 7 were hanged (Tojo et al.) and 18 sentenced to life. Emperor Hirohito was not indicted.

events.zh: 種族滅絕公約·Lemkin 推動
events.desc_zh: 1948/12/9 UN 通過《防止及懲治滅絕種族罪公約》，Raphael Lemkin 推動立法，回應納粹浩劫。
events.desc_en: On Dec 9, 1948, the UN adopted the Genocide Convention (pushed by Raphael Lemkin), directly responding to the Holocaust.

events.desc_zh: 1947/3/12 Truman 在國會演講承諾援希土反共，實質宣告美國全球圍堵政策，冷戰正式開啟。
events.desc_en: On Mar 12, 1947, Truman addressed Congress pledging support for Greece/Turkey against communism—effectively launching global containment.

events.zh: NATO 北大西洋公約組織
events.desc_zh: 1949/4/4 12 國在華府簽《北大西洋公約》建立集體防衛同盟，第 5 條規定攻擊一國視同攻擊全體。
events.desc_en: On Apr 4, 1949, 12 countries signed the North Atlantic Treaty in Washington, establishing a collective defense alliance under Article 5.

events.desc_zh: 1955/5/14 蘇聯與 7 東歐衛星國在華沙簽互助條約，對抗 NATO；確立兩極體系。
events.desc_en: On May 14, 1955, the USSR and 7 Eastern European satellites signed the Warsaw Treaty in opposition to NATO, crystallizing the bipolar system.

events.desc_zh: 1956/10/23 匈牙利反蘇起義震動東歐，Nagy 宣布退出華約；11/4 蘇軍坦克入布達佩斯鎮壓，殺 2,500 人。
events.desc_en: The Oct 23, 1956 Hungarian uprising shocked the Eastern Bloc; after Nagy announced withdrawal from the Warsaw Pact, Soviet tanks crushed it on Nov 4, killing 2,500.

events.zh: 豬灣·CIA 入侵古巴失敗
events.desc_zh: 1961/4/17 CIA 支持流亡古巴人 1,400 登陸豬灣失敗，Castro 軍 3 日殲滅；Kennedy 政治首敗。
events.desc_en: On Apr 17, 1961, 1,400 CIA-backed Cuban exiles landed at the Bay of Pigs but were crushed by Castro's forces in 3 days—an early Kennedy setback.

events.zh: 柏林圍牆·冷戰象徵 28 年
events.desc_zh: 1961/8/13 東德連夜築牆隔柏林 28 年；物理與象徵意義上定義冷戰，約 140 人試越被殺。
events.desc_en: Built overnight on Aug 13, 1961, the Berlin Wall divided the city for 28 years; ~140 were killed trying to cross—the definitive Cold War symbol.

events.desc_zh: 1969/7/20 Armstrong 與 Aldrin 成首批踏月人類，美贏太空競賽，「One small step」成世紀名句。
events.desc_en: On Jul 20, 1969, Armstrong and Aldrin became the first humans on the Moon, winning the Space Race; 'One small step…' was the century's iconic line.

events.zh: Nixon 訪華·打破冷戰僵局
events.desc_zh: 1972/2/21 Nixon 與毛澤東會晤北京，Kissinger 先期秘訪促成；美中聯手制蘇，冷戰三角成形。
events.desc_en: On Feb 21, 1972, Nixon met Mao in Beijing (after Kissinger's secret trip); the US-China opening created a triangular Cold War dynamic.

events.zh: INF 條約·首次廢核武類別
events.desc_zh: 1987/12/8 Reagan 與 Gorbachev 簽中程導彈條約，首次消除整類核武（500-5500 km）。
events.desc_en: On Dec 8, 1987, Reagan and Gorbachev signed the Intermediate-Range Nuclear Forces Treaty—the first to eliminate an entire class of nuclear weapons (500-5500 km).

events.desc_zh: 1989/11/9 東德官員誤報旅行新規即時生效，民眾湧向圍牆，衛兵不阻，世紀性時刻象徵冷戰結束。
events.desc_en: On Nov 9, 1989, an East German spokesperson mistakenly announced immediate travel liberalization; crowds rushed the Wall unopposed—the century's defining moment.

events.zh: 捷克斯洛伐克政變·東歐共產化
events.desc_zh: 1948/2/25 捷共以街頭示威脅迫 Beneš 總統交權，東歐最後民主國淪入蘇聯陣營。
events.desc_en: On Feb 25, 1948, Czechoslovak Communists coerced President Beneš via street demonstrations; the last Eastern European democracy fell to Soviet orbit.

events.desc_zh: 1948/6/24-1949/5/12 蘇聯封西柏林陸路，美英以 27 萬航次空投物資 11 個月解封；冷戰首次重大對抗。
events.desc_en: From Jun 24, 1948 to May 12, 1949, the Soviets blockaded West Berlin; 270,000 Allied airlift flights delivered supplies for 11 months—the first major Cold War confrontation.

events.desc_zh: 1949/8/29 蘇聯在 Semipalatinsk 試爆首顆原子彈，比美預測早 4 年；核壟斷結束，核競賽啟動。
events.desc_en: On Aug 29, 1949, the USSR detonated its first atomic bomb at Semipalatinsk—4 years ahead of US predictions; the nuclear arms race began.

events.desc_zh: 1953/6/17 東柏林工人罷工擴為全東德起義，蘇聯坦克鎮壓，55 人死；東歐首次反蘇抗爭。
events.desc_en: On Jun 17, 1953, East Berlin workers' strikes escalated to a nationwide uprising; Soviet tanks crushed it, killing 55—the first Eastern Bloc revolt.

events.zh: Castle Bravo 氫彈試·15 MT 誤算
events.desc_zh: 1954/3/1 美在 Bikini Atoll 試爆 15 MT 氫彈，產能比預估超 2 倍，日本漁船「第五福龍丸」受輻射傷亡。
events.desc_en: On Mar 1, 1954, the US detonated a 15 MT H-bomb at Bikini Atoll; yield exceeded estimates 2x, contaminating Japanese fishing boat Daigo Fukuryu Maru.

events.zh: Khrushchev 秘密演講·去 Stalin 化
events.desc_zh: 1956/2/25 Khrushchev 在蘇共 20 大「秘密演講」譴責 Stalin 個人崇拜與恐怖，啟動去 Stalin 化，撼動共產陣營。
events.desc_en: On Feb 25, 1956 at the 20th Party Congress, Khrushchev's 'Secret Speech' denounced Stalin's cult and terror, launching de-Stalinization.

events.desc_zh: 1958/11/10 Khrushchev 要求西方 6 個月內撤離西柏林，使之成「自由城」；西方拒絕，為 1961 圍牆埋伏筆。
events.desc_en: On Nov 10, 1958, Khrushchev demanded Western withdrawal from West Berlin within 6 months; Western refusal set the stage for the 1961 Wall.

events.desc_zh: 1959/1/1 Batista 逃離，Castro 率革命軍進入哈瓦那；1961 宣布社會主義，美洲首個共產國家立於美國門口。
events.desc_en: On Jan 1, 1959, Batista fled and Castro entered Havana; in 1961 he declared Cuba socialist—the first communist state on America's doorstep.

events.desc_zh: 1960/5/1 美 U-2 偵察機被蘇聯飛彈擊落於烏拉爾，飛行員 Powers 被俘；Eisenhower 否認曝光後尷尬，巴黎高峰會崩。
events.desc_en: On May 1, 1960, a US U-2 was shot down over the Urals; pilot Powers was captured; Eisenhower's denial was exposed, wrecking the Paris summit.

events.desc_zh: 1963/6/20 古巴危機後美蘇簽協議建直通熱線，避免誤判；非紅色電話，是電傳打字機。
events.desc_en: On Jun 20, 1963, after the Cuban crisis, the US and USSR signed the hotline agreement—actually teleprinters, not a red phone.

events.desc_zh: 1963/8/5 美蘇英簽 PTBT，禁止大氣、水下、太空核試；法中未簽繼續試爆。
events.desc_en: On Aug 5, 1963, the US, USSR, and UK signed the PTBT banning atmospheric, underwater, and space tests; France and China did not sign.

events.desc_zh: 1968/7/1 五核大國與非核國簽 NPT，核國承諾裁軍、非核國放棄研發、換取和平核能使用。1970 生效。
events.desc_en: On Jul 1, 1968, nuclear and non-nuclear states signed the NPT: disarmament pledges + non-proliferation + peaceful nuclear use. Entered force 1970.

events.zh: SALT I 戰略武器談判啟動
events.desc_zh: 1969/11/17 美蘇在赫爾辛基展開戰略武器限制談判，目標凍結 ICBM 與 SLBM 數量。
events.desc_en: On Nov 17, 1969, US-Soviet Strategic Arms Limitation Talks opened in Helsinki, aiming to freeze ICBM and SLBM numbers.

events.zh: SALT I 簽署·Moscow 峰會
events.desc_zh: 1972/5/26 Nixon 訪莫斯科，與 Brezhnev 簽 SALT I 與 ABM 條約，凍結戰略核武數量 5 年。
events.desc_en: On May 26, 1972, Nixon in Moscow signed SALT I and the ABM Treaty with Brezhnev, freezing strategic nuclear weapons for 5 years.

events.desc_zh: 1975/8/1 35 國在赫爾辛基簽最終議定書，承認戰後邊界 + 人權條款；成東歐異議者法律依據。
events.desc_en: On Aug 1, 1975, 35 nations signed the Helsinki Final Act, recognizing postwar borders + human rights—a legal lever for Eastern Bloc dissidents.

events.zh: Camp David 協議·埃以和解
events.desc_zh: 1978/9/17 Carter 斡旋 13 天，促成 Sadat（埃）與 Begin（以）簽 Camp David 協議，埃以和平、美獲中東立足。
events.desc_en: On Sep 17, 1978, Carter brokered 13 days of talks between Sadat (Egypt) and Begin (Israel); Egypt-Israel peace granted the US a Middle East foothold.

events.desc_zh: 1979/1/1 美國承認中華人民共和國為唯一中國政府，與中華民國斷交；Deng Xiaoping 月底訪美。
events.desc_en: On Jan 1, 1979, the US recognized the PRC as the sole Chinese government, breaking ties with ROC; Deng Xiaoping visited the US that month.

events.zh: 波蘭團結工聯·第一自由工會
events.desc_zh: 1980/8/14 Gdańsk 列寧造船廠罷工，Lech Wałęsa 領導，9/17 正式成立團結工聯，東歐首個自由工會。
events.desc_en: On Aug 14, 1980, strikes at the Gdańsk Lenin Shipyard led by Lech Wałęsa formed Solidarity (Sep 17)—the first free trade union in the Eastern Bloc.

events.desc_zh: 1981/12/13 Jaruzelski 將軍宣布全國戒嚴，取締團結工聯；延 18 個月才解除，延緩共黨崩解 8 年。
events.desc_en: On Dec 13, 1981, General Jaruzelski declared martial law, banning Solidarity; lifted 18 months later, delaying the regime's collapse by ~8 years.

events.desc_zh: 1983/3/23 Reagan 宣布以太空雷射、飛彈攔截系統對抗蘇聯 ICBM；技術未成熟但經濟壓力加速蘇聯崩潰。
events.desc_en: On Mar 23, 1983, Reagan announced SDI—space-based lasers and anti-missile systems; though technologically immature, economic pressure hastened Soviet collapse.

events.en: Korean Air Lines Flight 007 Shot Down
events.desc_zh: 1983/9/1 韓航 747 誤入蘇聯領空，被 Su-15 擊落於庫頁島，269 人罹難包括美眾議員；冷戰緊張升至 1962 以來最高。
events.desc_en: On Sep 1, 1983, a Korean Air 747 strayed into Soviet airspace and was shot down near Sakhalin; 269 died including a US Congressman—tensions spiked to 1962 levels.

events.desc_zh: 1986/10/11-12 Reagan 與 Gorbachev 在冰島會晤，差點同意徹底廢核武；因 SDI 分歧破局，但為 INF 鋪路。
events.desc_en: On Oct 11-12, 1986 in Iceland, Reagan and Gorbachev came close to agreeing to eliminate all nuclear weapons; blocked by SDI disagreement but paved way for INF.

events.desc_zh: 1989/4-6 北京學生民運要求政改，占天安門廣場 7 週；6/4 解放軍以坦克鎮壓，死傷估數百至數千。
events.desc_en: Apr-Jun 1989, Beijing students demanded reform, occupying Tiananmen for 7 weeks; PLA tanks crushed protests on Jun 4, killing hundreds to thousands.

events.zh: 東歐劇變·共黨政權連鎖崩解
events.desc_zh: 1989/6-1990/3 波匈羅捷東德等共產政權 9 個月內連鎖崩潰；羅馬尼亞 Ceaușescu 12/25 被處決，其餘多和平轉型。
events.desc_en: From Jun 1989 to Mar 1990, communist regimes in Poland, Hungary, East Germany, Czechoslovakia, Bulgaria, Romania fell within 9 months; Ceaușescu was executed Dec 25.

events.desc_zh: 1990/10/3 東西德正式統一，東德併入西德聯邦體制；Kohl 總理完成 Bismarck 以來的民族統一。
events.desc_en: On Oct 3, 1990, East and West Germany formally reunified, with East Germany joining the Federal Republic; Chancellor Kohl completed unity not seen since Bismarck.

events.zh: START I 戰略武器削減條約
events.desc_zh: 1991/7/31 Bush 與 Gorbachev 在莫斯科簽 START I，大幅削減戰略核彈頭至各方 6,000 枚；為冷戰時期最後軍控條約。
events.desc_en: On Jul 31, 1991, Bush and Gorbachev signed START I in Moscow, cutting strategic warheads to 6,000 each—the last Cold War arms control treaty.

events.zh: 莫斯科 8 月政變未遂
events.desc_zh: 1991/8/19 蘇共強硬派軟禁 Gorbachev，宣布接管；Yeltsin 立上俄議會坦克反抗，3 日失敗；蘇聯 4 個月後解體。
events.desc_en: On Aug 19, 1991, Soviet hardliners detained Gorbachev; Yeltsin atop a tank at the Russian Parliament defied them; the coup collapsed in 3 days, USSR fell 4 months later.

events.zh: 西征花剌子模·Otrar 血仇
events.desc_zh: 1219 Genghis 因 Otrar 殺使事件率 20 萬蒙古軍西征花剌子模，2 年內滅帝國；蒙古西擴起點。
events.desc_en: In 1219, Genghis led 200,000 Mongols west against Khwarezm (over the Otrar incident); within 2 years the empire was destroyed—the start of westward expansion.
events.amazon_title: Genghis Khan and the Making of the Modern World

events.desc_zh: 1227/8/18 Genghis 於西夏最後圍城途中病逝，密不發喪至西夏覆滅；遺體葬地至今成謎。
events.desc_en: Genghis Khan died on Aug 18, 1227 during the final siege of Western Xia; his death was kept secret until Xia fell. His tomb remains undiscovered.

events.zh: 入侵歐洲·Legnica + Mohi 雙勝
events.desc_zh: 1241/4 Batu 率 Subutai 指揮 2 週內接連在 Legnica 殲波德聯軍、Mohi 殲匈牙利軍；歐洲心臟洞開。
events.desc_en: In April 1241, under Subutai's direction, Batu's Mongols annihilated Polish-German forces at Legnica and Hungarian forces at Mohi within 2 weeks.

events.desc_zh: 1258/2/10 Hülegü 攻破 Baghdad 屠城 40 日，殺 Caliph Al-Musta'sim，終結 508 年阿拔斯王朝，伊斯蘭世界劇痛。
events.desc_en: On Feb 10, 1258, Hülegü sacked Baghdad over 40 days, killed Caliph Al-Musta'sim, ending 508 years of the Abbasid Caliphate—a trauma for the Islamic world.

events.desc_zh: 1260/9/3 Mamluk Sultan Qutuz 與 Baibars 在 Ain Jalut 首次擊敗蒙古軍，止住蒙古西擴；伊斯蘭世界保住。
events.desc_en: On Sep 3, 1260, Mamluk Sultan Qutuz and Baibars defeated the Mongols at Ain Jalut—the first major Mongol defeat, halting westward expansion.

events.en: Battle of Yamen · End of Song
events.desc_zh: 1279/3/19 南宋陸秀夫抱 8 歲末帝投海自盡，艦隊全滅；蒙古首次完全征服中國，東征達終點。
events.desc_en: On Mar 19, 1279, Song minister Lu Xiufu jumped into the sea with the 8-year-old emperor; the fleet was destroyed—Mongols fully conquered China for the first time.

events.desc_zh: 1294/2/18 Khubilai 死於大都，蒙古四大汗國此後各自為政，統一帝國終；元朝延續至 1368。
events.desc_en: Khubilai died on Feb 18, 1294 in Khanbaliq; the four Mongol khanates drifted apart—ending the unified empire. The Yuan lasted until 1368.

events.desc_zh: 1209 Genghis 圍西夏都中興府，逼 Li Anquan 稱臣進貢，蒙古首次征服一個定居國家。
events.desc_en: In 1209, Genghis besieged the Western Xia capital Zhongxing; Li Anquan submitted and paid tribute—Mongols' first conquest of a settled state.

events.desc_zh: 1211 Genghis 親率 10 萬蒙古軍南下攻金，大敗金軍於野狐嶺；蒙古攻金戰爭持續 23 年。
events.desc_en: In 1211, Genghis led 100,000 Mongols south against Jin, winning at Yehuling; the Mongol-Jin war lasted 23 years.

events.desc_zh: 1215/5/31 蒙古軍攻陷金朝中都（今北京），金宣宗南遷汴京；華北大半落入蒙古。
events.desc_en: On May 31, 1215, the Mongols took Zhongdu (modern Beijing); Emperor Xuanzong of Jin relocated to Kaifeng, leaving most of north China to the Mongols.

events.desc_zh: 1227/9 Genghis 死後不久西夏末帝投降即被殺，都城屠城；190 年西夏徹底滅國。
events.desc_en: Shortly after Genghis's death in 1227, the last Xia emperor surrendered and was killed, the capital massacred—ending 190 years of Western Xia.

events.desc_zh: 1231-1259 蒙古 6 次征高麗，Goryeo 王室避居江華島抗戰 30 年；1259 降服入貢，仍保王室。
events.desc_en: Mongols invaded Korea 6 times (1231-1259); the Goryeo court fled to Ganghwa Island for 30 years before submitting—the royal line continued.

events.desc_zh: 1234/2/9 蒙古與南宋聯軍圍蔡州，金末帝自縊，120 年金朝亡；蒙宋聯盟不久破裂。
events.desc_en: On Feb 9, 1234, Mongol-Song forces besieged Caizhou; the last Jin emperor hanged himself, ending 120 years of Jin. The alliance soon broke.

events.desc_zh: 1257/12 蒙古軍首次入大越，Trần 朝棄都戰術反擊；此後 1285、1287-88 再犯皆敗，蒙古未能征服越南。
events.desc_en: In Dec 1257, Mongols first invaded Đại Việt; the Trần dynasty used scorched-earth tactics. Two later invasions (1285, 1287-88) also failed.

events.zh: 文永之役·首次伐日（神風）
events.en: First Mongol Invasion of Japan · Bun'ei
events.desc_zh: 1274/11/19 蒙古+高麗聯軍 4 萬登陸九州博多灣，夜間暴風摧毀艦隊，被迫撤退；日方稱「神風」。
events.desc_en: On Nov 19, 1274, 40,000 Mongol-Korean forces landed at Hakata Bay, Kyushu; a typhoon destroyed the fleet—Japan's 'kamikaze' (divine wind).

events.zh: 弘安之役·二次伐日（神風 II）
events.en: Second Mongol Invasion of Japan · Kōan
events.desc_zh: 1281/6/21 蒙古+高麗+南宋降軍 14 萬分兩路入侵日本，再次被 8 月颱風摧毀艦隊；蒙古放棄日本。
events.desc_en: On Jun 21, 1281, 140,000 Mongol-Korean-former-Song forces invaded Japan in two fleets; an August typhoon again wrecked them. Mongols abandoned Japan.

events.desc_zh: 1293 Khubilai 派 2 萬海軍遠征爪哇，被 Raden Wijaya 誘擊敗；Majapahit 帝國藉此建國。
events.desc_en: In 1293, Khubilai sent 20,000 troops to Java; Raden Wijaya tricked and defeated them, using the victory to found the Majapahit Empire.

events.zh: Otrar 事件·花剌子模殺蒙古使
events.desc_zh: 1218 花剌子模總督 Inalchuq 扣押 450 蒙古商隊、處決 Genghis 特使；Genghis 憤而西征。
events.desc_en: In 1218, Khwarezmian governor Inalchuq seized a 450-man Mongol trade caravan and executed Genghis's envoy—triggering Genghis's western campaign.
