events.desc_zh: 1219-1221 Genghis 率蒙古軍摧毀 Bukhara、Samarkand、Merv、Nishapur 等大城；Shah Muhammad 逃死，帝國覆滅。
events.desc_en: From 1219-1221, Genghis destroyed Bukhara, Samarkand, Merv, and Nishapur; Shah Muhammad fled and died—the empire fell.

events.desc_zh: 1220/3 Genghis 攻破絲路明珠 Samarkand，屠工匠外之多數居民，震懾中亞。
events.desc_en: In March 1220, Genghis took the Silk Road jewel Samarkand, massacring most inhabitants (sparing artisans)—terrorizing Central Asia.

events.desc_zh: 1223/5/31 Subutai + Jebe 偵察遠征在 Kalka 河大破基輔羅斯-Cuman 聯軍；Rus 首次震撼接觸。
events.desc_en: On May 31, 1223, Subutai and Jebe's reconnaissance force crushed a Kievan Rus-Cuman coalition at the Kalka River—the Rus's first shocking encounter.

events.desc_zh: 1237-1240 Batu 率金帳汗國先鋒攻下 Ryazan、Vladimir、Moscow、Kiev；羅斯諸公國大半臣服，開「韃靼枷鎖」240 年。
events.desc_en: From 1237-1240, Batu's Golden Horde took Ryazan, Vladimir, Moscow, and Kiev; most Rus principalities submitted, starting the 240-year 'Tatar Yoke'.

events.desc_zh: 1241/4/9 Baidar + Kadan 率蒙古軍在 Legnica 殲西里西亞 Henry II 率波德聯軍；Henry 陣亡。
events.desc_en: On Apr 9, 1241, Baidar and Kadan's Mongols annihilated Henry II of Silesia's Polish-German coalition at Legnica; Henry died.

events.desc_zh: 1241/4/11 Batu + Subutai 在 Sajó 河畔 Mohi 殲匈牙利 Béla IV 王軍 6 萬；匈牙利王國幾乎崩潰。
events.desc_en: On Apr 11, 1241, Batu and Subutai annihilated 60,000 Hungarian troops under Béla IV at Mohi on the Sajó River—Hungary nearly collapsed.

events.desc_zh: 1241/12 Ögedei Khan 飲酒暴斃，消息 1242/3 傳至前線，諸王須回 Karakorum 選舉新大汗，歐洲戰事戛然而止。
events.desc_en: Ögedei Khan died suddenly in Dec 1241 (news reached the front in March 1242); princes had to return to Karakorum to elect a new Khan—Europe saved.

events.desc_zh: 1251/7 經 Batu 支持，Möngke（Tolui 子）被推舉為大汗，Ögedei 系被清洗；蒙古帝國重啟擴張。
events.desc_en: In July 1251, backed by Batu, Möngke (son of Tolui) was elected Great Khan; the Ögedeid line was purged, and expansion resumed.

events.desc_zh: 1253/10 Möngke 派弟 Hülegü 率 15 萬蒙古軍西征波斯-阿拉伯，1256 先滅刺客派 Nizari；目標 Abbasid。
events.desc_en: In Oct 1253, Möngke sent his brother Hülegü west with 150,000 Mongols; by 1256 the Assassins (Nizari) were destroyed, paving way to the Abbasids.

events.zh: Alamut 陷·刺客派 Nizari 滅
events.en: Fall of Alamut · Destruction of Nizari Assassins
events.desc_zh: 1256/12/15 Hülegü 攻破伊朗北部 Alamut 山堡，傳奇「刺客派」（Nizari Ismailis）終結 170 年。
events.desc_en: On Dec 15, 1256, Hülegü took Alamut in northern Iran, ending the legendary 170-year-old Nizari Ismaili 'Assassins'.

events.zh: Lisbon 大地震·啟蒙思想衝擊
events.desc_zh: 1755/11/1 萬聖節 9.0 級地震 + 海嘯 + 大火摧毀里斯本，5-10 萬死；動搖歐洲啟蒙思想對神意的信念（Voltaire 諷刺）。
events.desc_en: On All Saints' Day 1755, a M9.0 earthquake + tsunami + fire destroyed Lisbon (50-100k dead), shaking Enlightenment beliefs (prompting Voltaire's satire).

events.zh: Krakatoa 火山爆發·全球氣候擾動
events.desc_zh: 1883/8/26-27 印尼 Krakatoa 火山爆發，聲響 4800 km 外可聞，引發海嘯殺 3.6 萬人；火山灰入平流層造成數年全球氣溫下降。
events.desc_en: The 1883 Krakatoa eruption (Indonesia) was heard 4,800 km away, triggered tsunamis killing 36,000, and cooled global climate for years.

events.desc_zh: 1923/9/1 7.9 級地震 + 火災摧毀東京、橫濱，14 萬死；後續誤傳引發對朝鮮人的屠殺（6,000+ 死）。
events.desc_en: On Sep 1, 1923, a M7.9 quake + firestorm devastated Tokyo/Yokohama (140k dead); false rumors led to massacres of Koreans (6,000+ killed).

events.desc_zh: 1976/7/28 凌晨 7.5 級地震夷平唐山市，24 萬死、16 萬重傷；同年毛澤東逝世與文革結束，象徵中國動盪年代。
events.desc_en: On Jul 28, 1976, a M7.5 quake leveled Tangshan (240k dead, 160k injured)—the same year Mao died and the Cultural Revolution ended.

events.zh: Bhopal 毒氣洩漏·史上最嚴重工業災害
events.desc_zh: 1984/12/3 印度 Bhopal Union Carbide 農藥廠 MIC 毒氣外洩，1.5-2 萬死、逾 50 萬傷，跨國企業責任爭議至今。
events.desc_en: On Dec 3, 1984, methyl isocyanate leaked from a Union Carbide plant in Bhopal, India: 15-20k dead, 500k+ injured—a landmark in corporate accountability.

events.zh: 印度洋大海嘯·23 萬死
events.desc_zh: 2004/12/26 蘇門答臘外海 9.1 級地震引發橫越印度洋的海嘯，14 國逾 23 萬死；世界最致命海嘯，國際人道援助空前。
events.desc_en: On Dec 26, 2004, a M9.1 quake off Sumatra triggered a trans-Indian Ocean tsunami; 230,000+ died across 14 countries—the deadliest tsunami in history.

events.desc_zh: 2010/1/12 海地首都太子港 7.0 級地震，約 30 萬死、150 萬無家可歸；國際援助與後續霍亂爭議。
events.desc_en: On Jan 12, 2010, a M7.0 quake hit Port-au-Prince: ~300,000 dead, 1.5M homeless; aid efforts were shadowed by a later cholera outbreak.

events.desc_zh: 2011/3/11 東北外海 9.0 級地震 + 海嘯殺近 2 萬人、摧毀 Fukushima Daiichi 核電廠，成為 Chernobyl 以後最嚴重核災。
events.desc_en: On Mar 11, 2011, a M9.0 quake + tsunami killed ~20,000 and destroyed Fukushima Daiichi NPP—the worst nuclear disaster since Chernobyl.

events.desc_zh: 約公元前 1627 年希臘 Thera（今 Santorini）火山巨爆，可能重創 Minoan 文明，間接影響埃及氣候；青銅時代崩潰前奏。
events.desc_en: Around 1627 BC, Thera (Santorini) volcano erupted massively, likely crippling Minoan civilization and affecting Egyptian climate.

events.zh: 陝西華縣大地震·83 萬死
events.desc_zh: 1556/1/23 明嘉靖華縣 8.0 級地震，死 83 萬人，人類史上最致命地震；關中黃土窯洞大範圍塌陷。
events.desc_en: On Jan 23, 1556, a M8.0 quake in Shaanxi killed 830,000—the deadliest earthquake in human history; loess cave dwellings collapsed en masse.

events.desc_zh: 1815/4/10 印尼 Tambora 火山 VEI-7 爆發，人類有史以來最大火山事件，直接死 7 萬；次年成「無夏之年」。
events.desc_en: On Apr 10, 1815, Mount Tambora (Indonesia) erupted VEI-7—the largest in recorded history; 71,000 direct deaths, triggering 1816's 'Year Without a Summer'.

events.zh: San Francisco 地震·3 千死
events.desc_zh: 1906/4/18 7.9 級地震 + 火災摧毀 San Francisco 80%，3 千死 25 萬無家可歸；促現代地震學發展。
events.desc_en: On Apr 18, 1906, a M7.9 quake + fire destroyed 80% of San Francisco (3,000 dead, 250k homeless), shaping modern seismology.

events.zh: Valdivia 地震·9.5 Mw 史上最強
events.desc_zh: 1960/5/22 智利 Valdivia 9.5 Mw 地震，有記錄以來最強；引發太平洋跨洋海嘯重創夏威夷、日本。
events.desc_en: On May 22, 1960, Chile's Valdivia suffered a M9.5 quake—the largest ever recorded; Pacific tsunamis devastated Hawaii and Japan.

events.desc_zh: 1980/5/18 美國華盛頓州 Mount St. Helens 爆發，側向爆破削去山頂 400 米，57 死；現代最具研究價值的火山事件。
events.desc_en: On May 18, 1980, Mount St. Helens (Washington) erupted laterally, blasting off 400m of its summit; 57 dead—the most studied modern eruption.

events.desc_zh: 1815 Tambora 爆發後 1816 年北半球氣溫降 0.4-0.7℃，歐美農作歉收、飢荒；Mary Shelley 於此年寫《Frankenstein》。
events.desc_en: Following Tambora's 1815 eruption, 1816 saw northern temps drop 0.4-0.7°C, causing famine; Mary Shelley wrote Frankenstein that year.

events.desc_zh: 1876-1879 El Niño 引發印度南部 + 中國北方大旱，殖民政府繼續出口糧食；印度 550-1000 萬死，中國 900-1300 萬死。
events.desc_en: El Niño-driven droughts in southern India and northern China (1876-79); colonial India exported grain while 5.5-10M Indians and 9-13M Chinese died.

events.zh: 美國 Dust Bowl 塵暴區
events.desc_zh: 1930-1940 美國大平原乾旱 + 過度耕作形成大規模沙塵暴，250 萬人遷徙至加州；Steinbeck《憤怒的葡萄》背景。
events.desc_en: Drought and over-farming turned the Great Plains into a decade-long dust storm (1930-40); 2.5M migrated to California—Steinbeck's Grapes of Wrath.

events.desc_zh: 1970/11/12 Bhola 氣旋襲東巴基斯坦（今孟加拉），50 萬死，人類史上最致命熱帶氣旋；加速孟加拉獨立運動。
events.desc_en: On Nov 12, 1970, Cyclone Bhola hit East Pakistan (now Bangladesh): 500,000 dead—the deadliest tropical cyclone in history; accelerated Bangladesh independence.

events.desc_zh: 2013/11/8 Haiyan（海燕）以 315 km/h 風速登陸菲律賓，為登陸時最強颱風；6,300 死、400 萬無家可歸。
events.desc_en: On Nov 8, 2013, Typhoon Haiyan hit the Philippines at 315 km/h—the strongest landfall ever recorded; 6,300 dead, 4M homeless.

events.desc_zh: 2019-2020 夏 澳洲破紀錄高溫 + 乾旱引發野火，焚 2400 萬公頃（相當於英國面積），30 億動物死亡；氣候變遷標誌事件。
events.desc_en: The 2019-2020 'Black Summer' bushfires burned 24M hectares (size of UK), killing 3B animals—an iconic climate change event.

events.desc_zh: 1952/12/5-9 倫敦冬季燃煤與逆溫層造成超致命霧霾，4,000-12,000 死；推動 1956《Clean Air Act》開啟現代空污法規。
events.desc_en: From Dec 5-9, 1952, coal smoke + temperature inversion caused 4,000-12,000 deaths in London, leading to the 1956 Clean Air Act.

events.desc_zh: 1979/3/28 美國賓州 Three Mile Island 核電廠 2 號機爐心部分熔毀，零死亡但公眾信心受創，美核電發展停滯 30 年。
events.desc_en: On Mar 28, 1979, Three Mile Island Unit 2 suffered a partial meltdown in Pennsylvania; no deaths but public trust collapsed, halting US nuclear growth 30 years.

events.desc_zh: 1989/3/24 Exxon Valdez 油輪觸礁阿拉斯加 Prince William 灣，4 萬噸原油汙染 1,900 km 海岸；直至 2010 為美史上最大油汙。
events.desc_en: On Mar 24, 1989, the Exxon Valdez ran aground in Alaska's Prince William Sound, spilling 40,000 tons of crude over 1,900 km of coast.

events.desc_zh: 2010/4/20 BP 墨西哥灣 Deepwater Horizon 油井爆炸 11 死，油井噴發 87 天汙染 150 萬桶；美史上最大油汙。
events.desc_en: On Apr 20, 2010, BP's Deepwater Horizon rig exploded in the Gulf of Mexico (11 dead); 87 days of uncontrolled flow released 150M barrels—the largest US spill.

events.desc_zh: 2015/8/12 天津港危險品倉庫連環爆炸，173 死、800+ 傷，TNT 當量 450 噸；引發中國工安監管改革辯論。
events.desc_en: On Aug 12, 2015, a chemical warehouse at Tianjin Port exploded (TNT equiv 450t): 173 dead, 800+ injured—triggering debate on Chinese industrial safety.

events.desc_zh: 165-180 年羅馬帝國爆發疑似天花 / 麻疹的大瘟疫，死 500 萬（含 Marcus Aurelius 本人），動搖帝國巔峰。
events.desc_en: A suspected smallpox/measles plague hit the Roman Empire (165-180), killing ~5M including Marcus Aurelius—shaking the empire at its peak.

events.zh: Plague of Justinian·鼠疫首次世界大流行
events.desc_zh: 541-549 年 Yersinia pestis 鼠疫首次大流行，拜占庭首當其衝，全歐死 2,500-5,000 萬；重創 Justinian 復興計畫。
events.desc_en: The first Y. pestis pandemic (541-549) devastated Byzantium and Europe, killing 25-50M and crippling Justinian's reconquest.

events.zh: HIV/AIDS 首份 CDC 報告
events.desc_zh: 1981/6/5 CDC《MMWR》首載洛杉磯 5 例年輕男同志罕見肺孢子菌肺炎，開啟 HIV/AIDS 全球大流行認知。
events.desc_en: On Jun 5, 1981, the CDC's MMWR reported 5 young gay men with rare PCP pneumonia in LA—the start of the HIV/AIDS pandemic's recognition.

events.desc_zh: 2002/11 廣東首例 SARS-CoV 個案，2003 擴至 29 國造成 8,096 感染、774 死；促 WHO 改革全球公衛監控。
events.desc_en: The first SARS-CoV case emerged in Guangdong (Nov 2002); spread to 29 countries by 2003 (8,096 cases, 774 deaths), triggering WHO reforms.

events.zh: 哥倫布交換·新大陸疫病浩劫
events.desc_zh: 1492 後歐洲人帶天花、麻疹、流感入美洲，原住民無免疫力；一世紀內死亡 80-95%，最致命跨大陸疫病事件。
events.desc_en: After 1492, Europeans brought smallpox, measles, and flu to the Americas, killing 80-95% of indigenous populations—the deadliest cross-continental epidemic.

events.desc_zh: 1770-72 鼠疫襲莫斯科殺 10 萬（1/3 人口）；1771 暴動逼 Catherine 大帝改革公衛。
events.desc_en: Plague struck Moscow in 1770-72, killing 100,000 (a third of the city); the 1771 plague riot forced Catherine the Great's public health reforms.

events.desc_zh: 1817-24 霍亂首從孟加拉沿貿易路線擴至東亞、中東、俄羅斯；開啟 19 世紀 7 波霍亂大流行。
events.desc_en: The first cholera pandemic (1817-24) spread from Bengal along trade routes to East Asia, the Middle East, and Russia—starting 19th-century cholera waves.

events.zh: 第三次霍亂·John Snow 發現水媒
events.desc_zh: 1852-60 霍亂全球死逾 100 萬，John Snow 1854 倫敦 Broad Street 疫調證實水媒傳播，近代流行病學起點。
events.desc_en: The third cholera pandemic (1852-60) killed over a million; John Snow's 1854 Broad Street investigation proved waterborne transmission—birthing epidemiology.

events.desc_zh: 1889-91 首個現代運輸時代全球流感大流行，從聖彼得堡沿鐵路擴至全球，殺 100 萬；可能是冠狀病毒。
events.desc_en: The 1889-91 flu pandemic spread from St. Petersburg along railways—the first in the modern transport era; 1M dead. Possibly a coronavirus.

events.desc_zh: 1957 H2N2 從貴州爆發擴至全球，殺 110 萬人；20 世紀第二大流感。
events.desc_en: H2N2 emerged from Guizhou in 1957, spread globally, killed 1.1M—the 20th century's second-worst flu pandemic.

events.desc_zh: 1968 H3N2 香港爆發擴至全球，殺 100 萬；H3N2 株至今仍在季節性流感中循環。
events.desc_en: H3N2 broke out in Hong Kong (1968), killed 1M globally; the H3N2 strain still circulates in seasonal flu.

events.desc_zh: 1980/5/8 WHO 第 33 屆大會宣布天花根除（最後自然病例 1977 索馬利亞）；人類首次根除一個傳染病，疫苗接種勝利。
events.desc_en: On May 8, 1980, the 33rd WHA declared smallpox eradicated (last natural case: Somalia 1977)—the first disease ever eliminated by humanity.

events.zh: H5N1 禽流感·人畜共通警訊
events.desc_zh: 1997/5 香港首例 H5N1 人感染禽流感，撲殺 140 萬隻雞防堵；成後續流感監測核心。
events.desc_en: The first human H5N1 bird flu case emerged in Hong Kong (May 1997); 1.4M chickens were culled, setting the pattern for future flu surveillance.

events.desc_zh: 2009/4 墨西哥爆 H1N1 豬流感，WHO 宣布全球大流行，感染 70 萬報告個案，死 15 萬-57 萬。
events.desc_en: The 2009 H1N1 (swine flu) emerged in Mexico in April; WHO declared pandemic; 700k reported cases, 150-570k deaths.

events.desc_zh: 2012/9 沙烏地發現首例 MERS 冠狀病毒，2015 韓國大爆 186 例 36 死；致死率約 35% 遠高於 SARS。
events.desc_en: MERS-CoV was first identified in Saudi Arabia (Sep 2012); a 2015 South Korean outbreak had 186 cases/36 deaths—mortality ~35%, far higher than SARS.

events.desc_zh: 2014-16 幾內亞、獅子山、賴比瑞亞伊波拉大爆發，2.85 萬感染、1.13 萬死，首次都市傳播；引發全球警戒。
events.desc_en: The 2014-16 Ebola outbreak in Guinea, Sierra Leone, and Liberia caused 28,500 cases and 11,300 deaths—the first urban Ebola spread, triggering global alarm.

events.desc_zh: 2015-16 茲卡經伊蚊在拉美爆發，孕婦感染致胎兒小頭症；WHO 宣布 PHEIC，影響 2016 里約奧運。
events.desc_en: The 2015-16 Zika outbreak spread via Aedes mosquitoes in Latin America, causing microcephaly in infants; WHO declared PHEIC and it affected the Rio Olympics.

events.zh: 海地獨立·首個黑人共和國
events.desc_zh: 1804/1/1 Dessalines 宣告海地獨立，拉美首個奴隸起義建立的共和國；震撼大西洋奴隸制世界。
events.desc_en: On Jan 1, 1804, Dessalines declared Haiti independent—the first republic founded by a slave revolt, shocking the Atlantic slave system.

events.desc_zh: 1848 年歐洲 50+ 國革命浪潮：法、奧、德、義大利、匈牙利等地同時爆發；多數被鎮壓但憲政思想深植。
events.desc_en: In 1848, revolutions erupted across 50+ European countries (France, Austria, Germany, Italy, Hungary); mostly crushed but planted constitutionalism.

events.zh: 俄國十月革命·布爾什維克奪權
events.desc_zh: 1917/11/7（舊曆 10/25）列寧領導布爾什維克武裝奪取聖彼得堡，終結臨時政府；第一個共產政權成立。
events.desc_en: On Nov 7, 1917 (Oct 25 OS), Lenin's Bolsheviks seized Petrograd, ending the provisional government—founding the first communist state.

events.en: Founding of the People's Republic of China
events.desc_zh: 1949/10/1 毛澤東天安門宣告中華人民共和國成立，結束百年動亂與國共內戰；共產革命亞洲勝利。
events.desc_en: On Oct 1, 1949, Mao proclaimed the PRC at Tiananmen, ending a century of upheaval and the civil war—communism's Asian victory.

events.desc_zh: 1959/1/1 Batista 逃離，Castro 革命軍進哈瓦那；西半球首個共產政權，美洲冷戰前線。
events.desc_en: On Jan 1, 1959, Batista fled and Castro's forces entered Havana—the Western Hemisphere's first communist state, a Cold War flashpoint.

events.desc_zh: 1979/2/11 Khomeini 返國推翻 Pahlavi 王朝，建立伊斯蘭共和國；神權政治復興、中東政局翻轉。
events.desc_en: On Feb 11, 1979, Khomeini returned and toppled the Pahlavi monarchy, founding an Islamic republic—reviving theocracy and upending Mideast politics.

events.zh: 阿拉伯之春·中東民主浪潮
events.desc_zh: 2010/12 突尼西亞青年 Bouazizi 自焚引發阿拉伯之春，突、埃、利比亞、葉門政權倒台，敘利亞內戰延續至今。
events.desc_en: Bouazizi's self-immolation in Tunisia (Dec 2010) ignited the Arab Spring; regimes fell in Tunisia, Egypt, Libya, Yemen; Syria descended into civil war.

events.desc_zh: 1543 Copernicus《天體運行論》到 1687 Newton《原理》144 年，重構世界觀從亞里斯多德到機械宇宙；現代科學起點。
events.desc_en: From Copernicus's De Revolutionibus (1543) to Newton's Principia (1687), 144 years that remade worldview from Aristotelian to mechanical.

events.zh: 光榮革命·英國君主立憲
events.desc_zh: 1688 William III 登陸英格蘭推翻 James II，1689《權利法案》確立君主立憲；為美法革命思想源頭。
events.desc_en: In 1688, William III landed and ousted James II; the 1689 Bill of Rights established constitutional monarchy—a source of American/French revolutionary thought.

events.desc_zh: 1794 賓州農民反威士忌稅，Washington 親率 1.3 萬聯邦軍鎮壓；確立聯邦政府對內課稅權威。
events.desc_en: In 1794, Pennsylvania farmers rebelled against a whiskey tax; Washington personally led 13,000 federal troops to suppress it, asserting federal authority.

events.zh: 巴黎公社·首個工人政權
events.desc_zh: 1871/3-5 普法戰爭後巴黎勞工武裝成立公社，72 天實驗被政府軍血腥鎮壓殺 2 萬；Marx 認為是無產階級革命預演。
events.desc_en: From Mar-May 1871 after the Franco-Prussian War, Parisian workers established the Commune; crushed in 72 days (20,000 killed). Marx saw it as a proletarian rehearsal.

events.desc_zh: 1911/10/10 武昌起義，孫中山領導同盟會推翻清朝；1912/1/1 中華民國成立，東亞首個共和國。
events.desc_en: The Wuchang Uprising (Oct 10, 1911) led by Sun Yat-sen's Tongmenghui toppled the Qing; the Republic of China was founded Jan 1, 1912—East Asia's first republic.

events.desc_zh: 1989/11-12 捷克斯洛伐克學生起義和平推翻共產政權，Havel 當選總統；和平轉型典範。
events.desc_en: In Nov-Dec 1989, Czechoslovak student protests peacefully toppled the communist regime; Havel became president—a model peaceful transition.

events.desc_zh: 2004/11-2005/1 烏克蘭總統選舉舞弊引發和平示威，Yushchenko 最終當選；親西方派勝，為 2014 Maidan 伏筆。
events.desc_en: The 2004 Ukrainian presidential election's rigging sparked peaceful protests; Yushchenko eventually won—a pro-West victory that presaged 2014 Maidan.

events.desc_zh: 2014/2/18-22 基輔 Maidan 抗議升級為血腥衝突，Yanukovych 逃俄；觸發俄國併吞克里米亞與東烏戰爭。
events.desc_en: From Feb 18-22, 2014, Kyiv's Maidan protests erupted into bloody clashes; Yanukovych fled—triggering Russian annexation of Crimea and eastern Ukraine war.

events.zh: Watt 改進蒸汽機·分離冷凝器
events.desc_zh: 1769/1/5 James Watt 獲專利分離冷凝器，效率提升 4 倍，真正啟動工業革命；「馬力」單位即來自此。
events.desc_en: On Jan 5, 1769, James Watt patented his separate condenser, quadrupling efficiency and truly igniting the Industrial Revolution.

events.desc_zh: 1856 Henry Bessemer 發表轉爐煉鋼法，鋼鐵成本暴跌，開啟第二次工業革命（鋼鐵、鐵路、摩天樓時代）。
events.desc_en: Henry Bessemer's 1856 converter process collapsed steel costs, kicking off the Second Industrial Revolution—steel, railways, skyscrapers.

events.zh: Ford 裝配線·大量生產時代
events.desc_zh: 1913/12/1 Ford 在 Highland Park 廠導入移動裝配線，Model T 組裝時間從 12 小時降至 93 分；勞工日薪 5 美元轟動。
events.desc_en: On Dec 1, 1913, Ford introduced the moving assembly line at Highland Park; Model T assembly dropped from 12h to 93min; $5/day wage shocked the world.

events.desc_zh: 1946/2/14 賓大公開 ENIAC 電子計算機，18,000 真空管、30 噸；開啟資訊革命（第三次工業）。
events.desc_en: On Feb 14, 1946, UPenn unveiled ENIAC: 18,000 vacuum tubes, 30 tons—launching the Information Revolution (Third Industrial).

events.zh: World Wide Web 開放公眾
events.desc_zh: 1991/8/6 CERN 的 Tim Berners-Lee 公開首個網頁與瀏覽器原始碼，Web 向全球免費開放；引爆網際網路時代。
events.desc_en: On Aug 6, 1991, CERN's Tim Berners-Lee released the first webpage and free source code, opening the Web to the world and igniting the Internet era.

events.desc_zh: 2015+ 人工智慧、物聯網、大數據、生物科技、量子運算融合重塑產業；Klaus Schwab 達沃斯論壇提出。
events.desc_en: From 2015+, AI, IoT, big data, biotech, and quantum computing converge to reshape industries—termed 'Fourth Industrial Revolution' by Klaus Schwab.

events.desc_zh: 1687/7/5 Newton 出版《Philosophiæ Naturalis Principia Mathematica》，三大運動定律 + 萬有引力，定古典物理 300 年。
events.desc_en: On Jul 5, 1687, Newton published Philosophiæ Naturalis Principia Mathematica: three laws of motion + universal gravitation—classical physics for 300 years.

events.desc_zh: 1789 Lavoisier 出版《化學綱要》建立質量守恆、氧化理論，廢除「燃素說」；近代化學奠基。同年法國大革命爆發。
events.desc_en: In 1789, Lavoisier published Traité élémentaire de chimie, establishing mass conservation and oxygen theory—founding modern chemistry.

events.desc_zh: 1866 奧地利修士 Mendel 發表豌豆實驗結果，建立遺傳三大定律；被埋沒至 1900 重新發現，奠基遺傳學。
events.desc_en: In 1866, Austrian monk Gregor Mendel published his pea experiments establishing the laws of heredity; rediscovered in 1900, founding genetics.

events.zh: Einstein 狹義相對論·奇蹟年
events.desc_zh: 1905 Einstein 26 歲在專利局發表 4 篇劃時代論文（光電效應、布朗運動、狹義相對論、E=mc²）；物理學革命。
events.desc_en: In 1905, 26-year-old Einstein published 4 revolutionary papers (photoelectric effect, Brownian motion, SR, E=mc²)—a physics revolution.

events.zh: 量子力學誕生·Heisenberg 矩陣
events.desc_zh: 1925 Heisenberg 發表矩陣力學，Schrödinger 次年提波動方程，Born 統計解釋；古典決定論崩潰。
events.desc_en: In 1925, Heisenberg introduced matrix mechanics; Schrödinger's wave equation followed in 1926; Born's statistical interpretation ended classical determinism.

events.desc_zh: 1953/4/25 Watson & Crick 在《Nature》發表 DNA 雙螺旋結構（依 Franklin X 射線照片）；生物學革命開啟分子時代。
events.desc_en: On Apr 25, 1953, Watson & Crick published the DNA double helix in Nature (based on Franklin's X-ray data)—launching the molecular biology era.

events.desc_zh: 1498/5/20 葡萄牙 Vasco da Gama 繞好望角抵印度 Calicut，首次歐洲人直航印度；終結威尼斯-阿拉伯香料壟斷。
events.desc_en: On May 20, 1498, Vasco da Gama reached Calicut via the Cape of Good Hope—the first European sea route to India, ending Venetian/Arab spice monopoly.

events.desc_zh: 1998/11/20 俄 Zarya 模組發射，ISS 首個組件上軌；15 國合作，迄今人類長期太空居住試驗場。
events.desc_en: On Nov 20, 1998, Russia's Zarya module launched—the first ISS component; a 15-nation partnership, humanity's longest continuous presence in space.

events.zh: James Webb 太空望遠鏡發射
events.desc_zh: 2021/12/25 JWST 聖誕發射升空至 L2 點，最大紅外望遠鏡，觀測宇宙 135 億光年前早期星系；Hubble 繼任者。
events.desc_en: On Dec 25, 2021, JWST launched to L2—the largest IR telescope ever, observing galaxies 13.5B years back; Hubble's successor.

events.en: Dias Rounds Cape of Good Hope
events.desc_zh: 1488/2 葡萄牙 Dias 首次繞過非洲南端好望角（原名風暴角），開印度航路伏筆。
events.desc_en: In Feb 1488, Portuguese Dias first rounded Africa's southern tip (Cape of Storms, later renamed Good Hope), paving the Indian Ocean route.

events.desc_zh: 1500/4/22 葡萄牙 Cabral 前往印度途中偏航意外抵巴西，為葡萄牙聲索；1494 Tordesillas 條約線恰好將巴西劃給葡。
events.desc_en: On Apr 22, 1500, Portuguese Cabral accidentally reached Brazil en route to India; claimed for Portugal under the 1494 Tordesillas line.

events.desc_zh: 1519/2/18 西班牙 Cortés 登陸 Veracruz，600 兵 + 疫病 + 土著盟軍 2 年滅阿茲特克帝國，奪 Tenochtitlan 1521。
events.desc_en: On Feb 18, 1519, Spanish Cortés landed at Veracruz; with 600 men + disease + indigenous allies, he destroyed the Aztec Empire, taking Tenochtitlan in 1521.

events.desc_zh: 1531 Pizarro 率 168 兵登秘魯，1533 擒殺 Inca 王 Atahualpa 於 Cajamarca，歐洲人以少勝多的另一範例。
events.desc_en: In 1531, Pizarro landed in Peru with 168 men; in 1533 he captured and killed Inca emperor Atahualpa at Cajamarca—another 'few against many' conquest.

events.desc_zh: 1577-1580 英國 Francis Drake 完成 Magellan 以後第二次環球航行，順道劫掠西班牙寶船；被 Elizabeth I 封爵。
events.desc_en: From 1577-1580, Francis Drake completed the second circumnavigation after Magellan, raiding Spanish treasure ships; knighted by Elizabeth I.

events.desc_zh: 1845 英國 Franklin 率 129 人兩艘船探西北航道，全員失蹤；搜救行動歷 20 年無果，2014 船骸尋獲。
events.desc_en: In 1845, Franklin's 129-man two-ship expedition to find the Northwest Passage vanished; 20-year searches failed, but wrecks were found in 2014.

events.desc_zh: 1893-96 挪威 Nansen 讓《Fram》隨海冰自西伯利亞漂至格陵蘭，最近達北極 86°14′N 創紀錄；首次證實北極為冰海。
events.desc_en: From 1893-96, Norwegian Nansen let his ship Fram drift with sea ice from Siberia to Greenland, reaching 86°14′N—proving the Arctic is an ice sea.

events.desc_zh: 1909/4/6 美國 Peary 聲稱抵北極點，爭議持續；2005 McMillan 徒步驗證極難達到。
events.desc_en: On Apr 6, 1909, American Peary claimed to have reached the North Pole; the claim remains disputed (later walks showed the feat was nearly impossible).

events.desc_zh: 1911/12/14 挪威 Amundsen 率 5 人以狗拉雪橇首抵南極點，比 Scott 早 34 日；現代極地探險勝利典範。
events.desc_en: On Dec 14, 1911, Norwegian Amundsen and 4 men reached the South Pole by dog sled—34 days before Scott; the gold standard of polar expeditions.

events.en: Scott Reaches Pole · Perishes on Return
events.desc_zh: 1912/1/17 英國 Scott 率隊抵南極，發現 Amundsen 的挪威旗；歸程遇暴風雪，全隊 1912/3 凍餒而死。
events.desc_en: On Jan 17, 1912, Scott's party reached the Pole, finding Amundsen's Norwegian flag; they all perished of cold and starvation on return in March 1912.

events.desc_zh: 1914-16 Shackleton 的《Endurance》被浮冰困斃沉沒，他率 28 人划小艇穿 1,300 km 險浪至南喬治亞島獲救，全員生還。
events.desc_en: From 1914-16, Shackleton's Endurance was crushed by ice; he led 28 men 1,300 km by small boat to South Georgia—all survived, a legendary feat.

events.zh: Glenn 首位美國太空人繞地
events.desc_zh: 1962/2/20 John Glenn 乘 Friendship 7 成為首位繞地軌道的美國人，追上蘇聯太空競賽；3 圈 4h55m 完成。
events.desc_en: On Feb 20, 1962, John Glenn aboard Friendship 7 became the first American to orbit Earth—catching up with the Soviet space race (3 orbits, 4h55m).

events.zh: Viking 1 登陸火星·首張火星地表照
events.desc_zh: 1976/7/20 NASA Viking 1 成為首個成功登陸火星傳回地表彩照的探測器；搜尋微生物實驗結果至今有爭議。
events.desc_en: On Jul 20, 1976, NASA's Viking 1 became the first successful Mars lander, returning surface color photos; its life-search results remain debated.

events.desc_zh: 1989/8/25 Voyager 2 飛掠海王星，人類至今唯一探測海王星的太空船；完成大巡遊四大外行星任務。
events.desc_en: On Aug 25, 1989, Voyager 2 flew by Neptune—humanity's only mission to ever visit the planet; completed the Grand Tour of outer planets.

events.desc_zh: 1997 發射、2004 抵土星、2005 Huygens 登陸 Titan、2017 主控撞入土星結束 20 年任務；土星系研究里程碑。
events.desc_en: Launched 1997, arrived Saturn 2004, Huygens landed on Titan 2005; ended with controlled Saturn plunge in 2017—a 20-year mission epoch.

events.desc_zh: 2015/7/14 New Horizons 飛掠冥王星 1.2 萬 km，首次傳回冥王星高清影像；至今最遠行星探測。
events.desc_en: On Jul 14, 2015, New Horizons passed within 12,000 km of Pluto, sending the first high-resolution images of the dwarf planet.

events.zh: 美國獨立宣言·啟蒙革命藍圖
events.desc_zh: 1776/7/4 13 殖民地宣告脫英獨立，Jefferson 起草的宣言以 natural rights 為基，啟發後世民主革命。
events.desc_en: On Jul 4, 1776, the 13 colonies declared independence; Jefferson's natural-rights-based Declaration inspired later democratic revolutions.

events.zh: 法國大革命·10 年顛覆
events.desc_zh: 1789/7/14 巴士底獄到 1799/11/9 Napoleon 霧月政變，10 年間王權崩、恐怖統治、Napoleon 崛起；影響全球民主思想。
events.desc_en: From the storming of the Bastille (Jul 14, 1789) to Napoleon's 18 Brumaire coup (Nov 9, 1799): monarchy fell, Terror reigned, Napoleon rose.

events.zh: 墨西哥革命·10 年內戰
events.desc_zh: 1910-20 Díaz 獨裁遭 Madero 革命推翻，Zapata、Pancho Villa 率農民軍混戰 10 年，制定 1917 憲法；拉美 20 世紀首場大革命。
events.desc_en: From 1910-20, Díaz's dictatorship fell to Madero's revolution; Zapata and Pancho Villa led peasant armies for a decade, producing the 1917 Constitution.

events.zh: 德國十一月革命·帝國終結
events.desc_zh: 1918/11/9 Kaiser Wilhelm II 退位，威瑪共和國建立；水兵兵變擴至全國，終結 Hohenzollern 王朝。
events.desc_en: On Nov 9, 1918, Kaiser Wilhelm II abdicated after sailors' mutinies spread nationwide; the Weimar Republic was founded, ending Hohenzollern rule.

events.zh: 五四運動·中國現代化思潮
events.desc_zh: 1919/5/4 北京學生抗議巴黎和會將山東讓日本，延燒為新文化運動；白話文、民主、科學思潮啟蒙中國現代性。
events.desc_en: On May 4, 1919, Beijing students protested the Versailles concession of Shandong to Japan; the movement fueled the New Culture drive for vernacular, democracy, and science.

events.zh: 凱末爾革命·土耳其共和
events.desc_zh: 1923/10/29 Mustafa Kemal Atatürk 宣告土耳其共和國成立，廢哈里發制、西化改革、拉丁字母化；穆斯林世界首個世俗共和。
events.desc_en: On Oct 29, 1923, Atatürk proclaimed the Republic of Turkey, abolished the caliphate, westernized law, and Latinized the alphabet—the Muslim world's first secular republic.

events.desc_zh: 1947 印巴獨立到 1975 葡殖民地解體，近 30 年間亞非 80+ 國脫歐洲殖民獨立；20 世紀最大地緣變動。
events.desc_en: From Indian independence (1947) to Portugal's colonial collapse (1975), 80+ Asian/African nations broke free from European rule—the century's largest geopolitical shift.

events.desc_zh: 1760-1840 英國為首以蒸汽、紡織機械、鋼鐵、鐵路改變生產方式，全球經濟從農業轉工業；現代世界起點。
events.desc_en: From 1760-1840, Britain led a transformation via steam, textiles, iron, and rail—the world shifted from agrarian to industrial, launching modernity.

events.zh: 第二次工業革命·電氣化
events.desc_zh: 1870-1914 電力、內燃機、化學工業、鋼鐵大量生產，美德超英為工業強國；汽車、電燈、電話、無線電改變日常。
events.desc_en: From 1870-1914, electricity, combustion engines, chemicals, and mass steel production propelled the US and Germany past Britain; autos, electric light, phone, radio transformed daily life.

events.zh: 資訊革命·計算與網路時代
events.desc_zh: 1950-2000 電腦、半導體、網路把資訊變成主要經濟資源；Moore's Law 半世紀、網際網路商業化、知識經濟崛起。
events.desc_en: From 1950-2000, computers, semiconductors, and networking made information the main economic resource; Moore's Law held for 50 years; the Internet commercialized.

events.zh: Copernicus 日心說·《天體運行論》
events.desc_zh: 1543/5/24 Copernicus 臨終前出版《天體運行論》，推翻 1400 年 Ptolemy 地心說，啟動科學革命。
events.desc_en: On May 24, 1543, Copernicus published De Revolutionibus on his deathbed, overturning 1,400 years of Ptolemaic geocentrism and launching the Scientific Revolution.

events.zh: Galileo 望遠鏡觀測·《星際信使》
events.desc_zh: 1610/3/13 Galileo 出版《星際信使》，公開望遠鏡發現木星 4 衛星、月球山脈、金星相位，驗證 Copernicus 體系。
events.desc_en: On Mar 13, 1610, Galileo published Sidereus Nuncius revealing Jupiter's 4 moons, lunar mountains, and Venus phases—empirical support for Copernicus.

events.en: Darwin's On the Origin of Species
events.desc_zh: 1859/11/24 Darwin 出版《物種起源》，以天擇解釋生物多樣性，與創造論分道揚鑣；生物學革命。
events.desc_en: On Nov 24, 1859, Darwin published On the Origin of Species, explaining biodiversity via natural selection—a biological revolution splitting from creationism.

events.desc_zh: 1418-1460 葡萄牙 Henry 王子於 Sagres 設航海學校 + 資助探險，推動 Madeira、Azores、西非沿岸探索；大航海時代序曲。
events.desc_en: From 1418-1460, Prince Henry of Portugal founded a Sagres nautical school and sponsored expeditions along Madeira, the Azores, and the West African coast—prelude to the Age of Discovery.

events.zh: Tordesillas 條約·葡西瓜分地球
events.desc_zh: 1494/6/7 教宗調停下葡西以大西洋 46°W 經線劃世界：東葡、西西班牙；巴西恰好東側歸葡萄牙。
events.desc_en: On Jun 7, 1494, mediated by the Pope, Portugal and Spain split the world at ~46°W: east to Portugal, west to Spain—Brazil fell to Portugal by coincidence.

events.zh: Diu 海戰·葡萄牙稱霸印度洋
events.desc_zh: 1509/2/3 葡萄牙艦隊於印度 Diu 大敗 Mamluk-Gujarat-Venice 聯合艦隊，印度洋貿易 100 年葡萄牙主導。
events.desc_en: On Feb 3, 1509, a Portuguese fleet defeated a Mamluk-Gujarat-Venetian coalition off Diu—Portugal dominated Indian Ocean trade for the next century.

events.zh: 葡萄牙占麻六甲·控香料航線
events.desc_zh: 1511/8/24 Afonso de Albuquerque 率葡軍攻陷麻六甲蘇丹國，扼南海-印度洋咽喉；開啟歐洲對東南亞香料貿易掌控。
events.desc_en: On Aug 24, 1511, Afonso de Albuquerque's Portuguese forces took the Sultanate of Malacca, controlling the strait between South China Sea and Indian Ocean—and the spice trade.

events.zh: 馬尼拉帆船·太平洋貿易開通
events.desc_zh: 1565 Urdaneta 發現太平洋東行航線，馬尼拉-Acapulco 帆船航線開通，中墨貿易每年互通 250 年；全球銀本位形成。
events.desc_en: In 1565, Urdaneta discovered the eastward Pacific route; the Manila-Acapulco galleon trade linked Asia and the Americas for 250 years, forging a global silver economy.

events.zh: Janszoon 首位歐洲人抵澳洲
events.desc_zh: 1606/2/26 荷蘭 VOC 船長 Willem Janszoon 登 Cape York 半島，首位確證登陸澳洲的歐洲人；比 Cook 早 164 年。
events.desc_en: On Feb 26, 1606, Dutch VOC captain Willem Janszoon landed on Cape York Peninsula—the first European to set foot on Australia, 164 years before Cook.

events.desc_zh: 1642/12/13 荷蘭 VOC 船長 Tasman 發現紐西蘭（命名 Staten Landt），並繞澳洲南岸、發現 Tasmania 島。
events.desc_en: On Dec 13, 1642, Dutch VOC captain Tasman discovered New Zealand (naming it Staten Landt), also charting Australia's south coast and Tasmania.

events.desc_zh: 1728/8/15 丹麥裔俄羅斯海軍 Bering 奉 Peter 大帝之命，通過白令海峽確認亞美兩洲不相連；後續探險發現阿拉斯加。
events.desc_en: On Aug 15, 1728, Danish-Russian naval officer Vitus Bering (sent by Peter the Great) passed through the strait, confirming Asia and America are separate; later expeditions found Alaska.

events.zh: Chauvet 洞穴壁畫·人類最早藝術
events.desc_zh: 約公元前 32,000 年法國 Chauvet 洞穴壁畫，人類已知最早具象藝術；200 獅 / 犀 / 馬圖像精湛。
events.desc_en: Around 32,000 BC, Chauvet Cave in France holds humanity's earliest known figurative art—200 skilled images of lions, rhinos, horses.

events.zh: Parthenon 建成·古典希臘巔峰
events.desc_zh: 公元前 447-432 Phidias 主持雅典衛城 Parthenon 神殿，古希臘古典藝術與建築巔峰。
events.desc_en: From 447-432 BC, Phidias led the Parthenon's construction on the Acropolis—the apex of Classical Greek art and architecture.

events.desc_zh: 1305 Giotto 完成 Padua Scrovegni 禮拜堂壁畫，引入透視與人性化聖像；意大利文藝復興視覺革命起點。
events.desc_en: In 1305, Giotto completed the Scrovegni Chapel frescoes in Padua, introducing perspective and humanized figures—launching the Italian Renaissance.

events.desc_zh: 1874/4/15 Monet、Renoir、Degas 等在巴黎舉辦首屆印象派聯展，挑戰沙龍學院派；現代藝術起點。
events.desc_en: On Apr 15, 1874, Monet, Renoir, Degas et al. held the first Impressionist exhibition in Paris, defying the Salon—launching modern art.

events.desc_zh: 1907 Picasso 完成《Les Demoiselles d'Avignon》，融非洲面具美學與多視點，開啟立體主義與抽象藝術。
events.desc_en: In 1907, Picasso completed Les Demoiselles d'Avignon, fusing African mask aesthetics and multiple perspectives—launching Cubism.

events.desc_zh: 2021/3/11 Beeple《Everydays》以 6,930 萬美元在 Christie's 拍出，NFT 數位藝術震撼傳統藝術市場。
events.desc_en: On Mar 11, 2021, Beeple's Everydays sold for $69.3M at Christie's—NFT digital art shook the traditional art market.

events.zh: Willendorf 維納斯·史前女性雕像
events.desc_zh: 約公元前 28,000 奧地利出土 11 cm 石灰石小雕像，誇大女性特徵，可能為生育象徵；舊石器藝術代表。
events.desc_en: Around 28,000 BC, an 11 cm limestone figurine from Austria—exaggerated female features, possibly a fertility symbol; iconic Paleolithic art.

events.desc_zh: 公元前 210 秦始皇陵兵馬俑 8,000 件，每尊面貌獨特；1974 陝西農民鑿井發現，改寫中國雕塑史。
events.desc_en: Qin Shi Huang's Terracotta Army (~210 BC): 8,000 unique warriors; rediscovered by Shaanxi farmers in 1974, reshaping Chinese sculpture history.

events.zh: 拜占庭 icon 聖像藝術
events.desc_zh: 6 世紀起拜占庭聖像畫風格定型，金底、正面扁平、象徵性構圖；影響東正教藝術千年至今。
events.desc_en: From the 6th century, Byzantine icon painting set the template: gold ground, frontal flat figures, symbolic composition—shaping Orthodox art for 1,000+ years.

events.desc_zh: 1140 Saint-Denis 修道院長 Suger 引入尖拱、飛扶壁、彩色玻璃；巴黎聖母院、Chartres 等成歐洲中世紀藝術巔峰。
events.desc_en: From 1140, Abbot Suger's Saint-Denis introduced pointed arches, flying buttresses, stained glass; Notre-Dame and Chartres became Gothic masterpieces.

events.desc_zh: 1503-1519 達文西繪《蒙娜麗莎》，展現 sfumato 暈染技巧與心理深度；今為世界最知名肖像畫。
events.desc_en: Painted 1503-1519, Leonardo's Mona Lisa mastered sfumato and psychological depth—today the world's most famous portrait.

events.en: Rembrandt's Night Watch · Dutch Golden Age
events.desc_zh: 1642 Rembrandt 完成《夜巡》，光影戲劇化；荷蘭黃金時代（Vermeer、Hals 等）新興資產階級支持畫家。
events.desc_en: In 1642, Rembrandt completed The Night Watch, mastering dramatic light; the Dutch Golden Age (Vermeer, Hals) saw bourgeois patronage of art.

events.desc_zh: 1831 葛飾北齋《富嶽三十六景》之《神奈川巨浪裏》版畫傳世經典；浮世繪後影響 Van Gogh 等印象派。
events.desc_en: In 1831, Hokusai's Great Wave off Kanagawa (from 36 Views of Mt Fuji) became an ukiyo-e masterpiece, later inspiring Van Gogh and Impressionism.

events.zh: Delacroix《自由領導人民》·浪漫主義
events.desc_zh: 1830 七月革命後 Delacroix 繪《自由領導人民》，浪漫主義以激情動感反古典嚴謹；法國共和象徵。
events.desc_en: After the July Revolution, Delacroix's Liberty Leading the People (1830) exemplified Romanticism's passion vs Classicism's order.

events.desc_zh: 1889/6 梵谷在 Saint-Rémy 精神病院繪《星夜》，筆觸漩渦式表達情緒；1890 自殺，死後才成傳奇。
events.desc_en: In Jun 1889 at Saint-Rémy asylum, Van Gogh painted Starry Night with swirling expressive strokes; he died in 1890, becoming posthumously legendary.

events.desc_zh: 1917/4/9 Duchamp 將簽名的小便斗送獨立藝術家展被拒，但《Fountain》定義 ready-made，觀念藝術起源。
events.desc_en: On Apr 9, 1917, Duchamp submitted a signed urinal to the Independent Artists exhibition; rejected, Fountain defined the ready-made and conceptual art.

events.zh: Dalí《記憶的永恆》·超現實主義
events.desc_zh: 1931 Dalí 繪《記憶的永恆》（融化時鐘），Breton 領導超現實主義運動融合佛洛伊德夢境與藝術。
events.desc_en: In 1931, Dalí painted The Persistence of Memory (melting clocks); Breton's Surrealism fused Freudian dreams and art.

events.desc_zh: 1937/6/4 Picasso 為西班牙共和國展繪《格爾尼卡》，回應德軍轟炸巴斯克小鎮；20 世紀最重要反戰畫。
events.desc_en: On Jun 4, 1937, Picasso unveiled Guernica for the Spanish Republic pavilion, responding to the German bombing of the Basque town—the century's greatest antiwar painting.

events.zh: Pollock 滴畫·抽象表現主義
events.desc_zh: 1948 Pollock 在 Long Island 發展滴灑畫法，抽象表現主義將藝術中心從巴黎移至紐約。
events.desc_en: In 1948 on Long Island, Pollock developed drip painting; Abstract Expressionism shifted the art world's center from Paris to New York.

events.en: Warhol's Campbell's Soup Cans · Pop Art
events.desc_zh: 1962/7 Warhol 在 LA Ferus Gallery 展出 32 幅《康寶濃湯》絲網印刷，商業大眾文化入美術館；普普藝術爆發。
events.desc_en: In July 1962, Warhol showed 32 Campbell's Soup Cans silkscreens at Ferus Gallery LA; consumer culture entered the museum, igniting Pop Art.

events.desc_zh: 1981 Basquiat 從紐約塗鴉 SAMO 轉畫廊展出，非裔視角 + 原始派風格；1988 年 27 歲吸毒過量離世。
events.desc_en: In 1981, Basquiat transitioned from NYC street tagging (SAMO) to gallery exhibitions, bringing African-American voice and neo-expressionism; died at 27 in 1988.

events.desc_zh: 2022/7 Midjourney 公開測試、DALL-E 2 亮相，AI 生成藝術爆紅；引發著作權、原創性、藝術家工作倫理爭議。
events.desc_en: In July 2022, Midjourney and DALL-E 2 launched publicly; AI-generated art exploded, sparking debates on copyright, originality, and artist livelihoods.

events.zh: Avicenna《醫典》·中世紀醫學教科書
events.desc_zh: 1025 Ibn Sina（阿維森納）完成 5 卷《醫典》，融希臘、阿拉伯、印度醫學；歐亞醫學教科書至 17 世紀。
events.desc_en: In 1025, Ibn Sina (Avicenna) completed the 5-volume Canon of Medicine, synthesizing Greek, Arabic, Indian traditions—used in Eurasia until the 17th century.

events.desc_zh: 1543 Vesalius 出版精美木刻插圖《人體構造》，推翻 Galen 錯誤，開啟現代解剖學；與 Copernicus 同年出版。
events.desc_en: In 1543, Vesalius published De humani corporis fabrica with fine woodcuts, overturning Galenic errors and founding modern anatomy—same year as Copernicus.

events.zh: Pasteur 細菌理論·感染病範式革命
events.desc_zh: 1861 Pasteur 以曲頸瓶實驗推翻自然發生說，確立微生物致病論；為疫苗、巴氏消毒、抗生素鋪路。
events.desc_en: In 1861, Pasteur's swan-neck flask experiments refuted spontaneous generation and established germ theory—paving the way for vaccines, pasteurization, antibiotics.

events.desc_zh: 1928/9/28 Fleming 在聖瑪麗醫院偶然發現 Penicillium 黴菌殺菌；Florey、Chain 1940 量產，二戰救無數士兵。
events.desc_en: On Sep 28, 1928, Fleming accidentally noted Penicillium mold killed bacteria; Florey and Chain industrialized it in 1940, saving countless WWII soldiers.

events.desc_zh: 2003/4/14 Human Genome Project 宣布 99% 精度完成，費時 13 年、$2.7B；開啟精準醫療與基因治療時代。
events.desc_en: On Apr 14, 2003, the Human Genome Project announced 99%-accurate completion after 13 years and $2.7B—launching precision medicine and gene therapy.

events.zh: mRNA 新冠疫苗·生技平台革命
events.desc_zh: 2020/12 Pfizer-BioNTech / Moderna mRNA 新冠疫苗獲緊急授權；首款 mRNA 疫苗平台開啟生技醫療新時代。
events.desc_en: In Dec 2020, Pfizer-BioNTech and Moderna's mRNA COVID vaccines received emergency authorization—the first mRNA platform, launching a new biotech era.

events.zh: 埃及 Edwin Smith 外科手卷
events.desc_zh: 約前 1600 年埃及 Edwin Smith 手卷 48 病例外科描述，最早實證醫學文獻；區分治癒、難治、不治。
events.desc_en: Around 1600 BC, the Egyptian Edwin Smith Papyrus describes 48 surgical cases—the oldest empirical medical text, distinguishing curable/difficult/untreatable.

events.en: Sushruta Samhita · Father of Indian Surgery
events.desc_zh: 約前 600 印度 Sushruta 著《妙聞集》詳述 300 種手術、120 種器械、整形外科（鼻重建）。
events.desc_en: Around 600 BC, India's Sushruta authored Sushruta Samhita with 300 surgeries, 120 instruments, and plastic surgery (nose reconstruction).

events.desc_zh: 約前 100 年《黃帝內經》集中國古代醫學大成，建陰陽五行、經絡理論；為後世中醫核心經典。
events.desc_en: Compiled around 100 BC, the Huangdi Neijing consolidates ancient Chinese medicine—yin-yang, five phases, meridian theory—the foundation of TCM.

events.zh: Galen·羅馬御醫·醫學權威 1500 年
events.desc_zh: 162 Galen 任 Marcus Aurelius 御醫，解剖動物推測人體；其學說壟斷歐亞醫學 1500 年至 Vesalius 推翻。
events.desc_en: In 162 AD, Galen became Marcus Aurelius's court physician; his animal-based anatomy dominated Eurasian medicine for 1,500 years until Vesalius.

events.desc_zh: 約 900 年波斯 Rhazes（al-Razi）首次清楚區分天花與麻疹，並詳述臨床表現；中世紀伊斯蘭醫學巔峰。
events.desc_en: Around 900 AD, Persian Rhazes (al-Razi) first clearly distinguished smallpox from measles with detailed clinical descriptions—a peak of Islamic medicine.

events.zh: Al-Zahrawi《醫典手冊》·外科器械圖譜
events.desc_zh: 約 1000 年西班牙穆斯林 Al-Zahrawi 著 30 卷《醫典手冊》，繪 200 外科器械；歐洲中世紀外科教科書。
events.desc_en: Around 1000 AD, Al-Zahrawi (Spain) authored the 30-volume Kitab al-Tasrif with 200 surgical instruments—Europe's medieval surgical textbook.

events.zh: 威尼斯 40 日隔離·公衛起源
events.desc_zh: 1348 威尼斯黑死病中創 quaranta giorni（40 天）強制隔離，quarantine 一詞由此而來；近代公衛起源。
events.desc_en: During the 1348 Black Death, Venice imposed 40-day (quaranta giorni) forced isolation—origin of the word 'quarantine' and modern public health.

events.zh: Jenner 牛痘接種·疫苗誕生
events.desc_zh: 1796/5/14 Jenner 用牛痘為 8 歲 James Phipps 接種，證明可防天花；vaccine 一詞源於 vacca（牛）。
events.desc_en: On May 14, 1796, Jenner inoculated 8-year-old James Phipps with cowpox, proving smallpox prevention; 'vaccine' derives from 'vacca' (cow).

events.zh: Morton 乙醚麻醉·無痛手術
events.desc_zh: 1846/10/16 Morton 在波士頓麻省總醫院公開以乙醚麻醉做頸部手術，開啟無痛外科時代。
events.desc_en: On Oct 16, 1846, William Morton publicly demonstrated ether anesthesia at Massachusetts General Hospital—launching painless surgery.

events.desc_zh: 1867/3/16 Lister 發表《The Lancet》論文確立石炭酸消毒手術法，術後死亡率從 46% 降至 15%。
events.desc_en: On Mar 16, 1867, Lister's Lancet paper established carbolic acid antisepsis in surgery, dropping post-op mortality from 46% to 15%.

events.zh: Röntgen 發現 X 光·醫學影像起點
events.desc_zh: 1895/11/8 德國 Röntgen 意外發現新輻射，命名 X-ray；拍攝其妻手骨照片震驚世界；首位物理諾貝爾獎 1901。
events.desc_en: On Nov 8, 1895, Germany's Röntgen accidentally discovered a new radiation, naming it X-ray; his wife's hand skeleton photo stunned the world.

events.desc_zh: 1921/7/30 多倫多 Banting 與 Best 從狗胰臟萃取胰島素，1922 救治 14 歲糖尿病兒；1923 諾貝爾醫學獎。
events.desc_en: On Jul 30, 1921, Toronto's Banting and Best isolated insulin from dog pancreas; in 1922 they saved a 14-year-old diabetic—1923 Nobel Prize.

events.desc_zh: 1955/4/12 Salk 小兒麻痺疫苗臨床試驗宣布安全有效，全美歡慶；1988 全球根除計畫啟動。
events.desc_en: On Apr 12, 1955, Salk's polio vaccine was announced safe and effective, triggering US jubilation; global eradication began 1988.

events.desc_zh: 1953/4/25《Nature》發表 DNA 雙螺旋結構；依 Franklin X 射線繞射數據，生物學進入分子時代，醫學革命奠基。
events.desc_en: On Apr 25, 1953, Nature published the DNA double helix based on Franklin's X-ray data—biology entered the molecular age, seeding a medical revolution.

events.desc_zh: 1967/12/3 Christiaan Barnard 於南非開普敦 Groote Schuur 醫院完成首例人心臟移植；患者存活 18 天。
events.desc_en: On Dec 3, 1967, Christiaan Barnard performed the first human heart transplant at Groote Schuur Hospital, Cape Town; patient survived 18 days.

events.zh: 首位試管嬰兒 Louise Brown
events.desc_zh: 1978/7/25 Louise Brown 誕生，世界首例試管嬰兒；Edwards 與 Steptoe 突破不孕症，2010 諾貝爾醫學獎。
events.desc_en: On Jul 25, 1978, Louise Brown was born—the world's first IVF baby; Edwards and Steptoe's work earned the 2010 Nobel Prize.

events.desc_zh: 2012/6/28《Science》刊 Doudna 與 Charpentier 論文確立 CRISPR-Cas9 基因編輯平台；2020 諾貝爾化學獎。
events.desc_en: On Jun 28, 2012, Doudna and Charpentier's Science paper established CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing—2020 Nobel Prize in Chemistry.

events.zh: Moderna / Pfizer mRNA 疫苗三期
events.desc_zh: 2020/11 Pfizer-BioNTech 與 Moderna mRNA 疫苗三期試驗 95% 有效；12 月獲緊急授權，史上最快疫苗開發。
events.desc_en: In Nov 2020, Pfizer-BioNTech and Moderna mRNA phase 3 trials showed 95% efficacy; EUA in December—the fastest vaccine development in history.

events.zh: Guido d'Arezzo 五線譜記譜法
events.desc_zh: 約 1000 年義大利修士 Guido d'Arezzo 發明四線譜（後擴至五線）、Do-Re-Mi 音節；西方音樂首創系統記譜。
events.desc_en: Around 1000 AD, Italian monk Guido d'Arezzo invented four-line staff notation (later five) and solfège (Do-Re-Mi)—the first systematic Western notation.

events.zh: Bach《布蘭登堡協奏曲》·巴洛克巔峰
events.desc_zh: 1721/3/24 Bach 把 6 首協奏曲獻給勃蘭登堡侯爵，展現巴洛克對位與器樂配置藝術巔峰。
events.desc_en: On Mar 24, 1721, Bach presented 6 concertos to the Margrave of Brandenburg, epitomizing Baroque counterpoint and instrumental mastery.

events.zh: Beethoven 第九交響曲·《歡樂頌》
events.desc_zh: 1824/5/7 Beethoven 第九交響曲維也納首演，首次在交響曲引入合唱《歡樂頌》；作曲家已全聾；歐盟盟歌。
events.desc_en: On May 7, 1824, Beethoven's 9th Symphony premiered in Vienna, introducing choral Ode to Joy—composed while fully deaf; now the EU anthem.

events.desc_zh: 1920s 爵士從 New Orleans 擴至芝加哥、紐約，Louis Armstrong、Ellington 成巨星；Fitzgerald 命名「爵士年代」。
events.desc_en: In the 1920s, jazz spread from New Orleans to Chicago and New York; Louis Armstrong and Ellington became stars. Fitzgerald coined 'Jazz Age'.

events.zh: 披頭四登 Ed Sullivan·英國入侵
events.en: Beatles on Ed Sullivan · British Invasion
events.desc_zh: 1964/2/9 披頭四於 Ed Sullivan Show 美國首演，7,300 萬人觀看；開啟英國入侵與 60s 搖滾黃金期。
events.desc_en: On Feb 9, 1964, the Beatles debuted on the Ed Sullivan Show to 73M American viewers—launching the British Invasion and the 60s rock golden age.

events.desc_zh: 2008/10/7 Spotify 北歐上線，訂閱模式取代下載（iTunes）與實體；2010s 串流主導音樂產業，TikTok 推爆紅機制。
events.desc_en: On Oct 7, 2008, Spotify launched in the Nordics; subscription streaming replaced downloads, dominating music in the 2010s; TikTok later reshaped virality.

events.zh: Palestrina《教宗彌撒》·文藝復興音樂
events.desc_zh: 1567 Palestrina《教宗 Marcellus 彌撒》展現對位法典範；傳言救了教堂複音音樂免遭 Trent 大公會議禁止。
events.desc_en: In 1567, Palestrina's Missa Papae Marcelli showcased counterpoint mastery; legend says it saved church polyphony from the Council of Trent.

events.desc_zh: 1607/2/24 Monteverdi 在 Mantua 首演《L'Orfeo》，音樂與戲劇融合，被視為首部真正意義的歌劇作品。
events.desc_en: On Feb 24, 1607, Monteverdi's L'Orfeo premiered in Mantua—its fusion of music and drama is considered the first true opera.

events.desc_zh: 1725 Vivaldi 出版《四季》小提琴協奏曲集，標題音樂模仿鳥鳴、風雨、冰雪；巴洛克協奏曲經典。
events.desc_en: In 1725, Vivaldi published the Four Seasons violin concertos with programmatic imitations of birds, storms, and ice—a Baroque classic.

events.zh: Mozart《魔笛》首演·古典時期巔峰
events.desc_zh: 1791/9/30 Mozart《魔笛》維也納首演，融共濟會哲學、德語歌劇藝術；兩個月後 Mozart 病逝 35 歲。
events.desc_en: On Sep 30, 1791, Mozart's Magic Flute premiered in Vienna, blending Masonic philosophy and German singspiel; Mozart died 2 months later at 35.

events.zh: Chopin 巴黎首演·浪漫派鋼琴
events.desc_zh: 1832/2/26 波蘭 Chopin 在巴黎首演；創夜曲、敘事曲、瑪祖卡等鋼琴體裁；19 世紀浪漫鋼琴代言人。
events.desc_en: On Feb 26, 1832, Polish Chopin debuted in Paris; his nocturnes, ballades, and mazurkas defined Romantic piano music.

events.desc_zh: 1876/8/13-17 Wagner 為《Der Ring des Nibelungen》在 Bayreuth 建專屬劇院首演；4 日 16 小時連演。
events.desc_en: From Aug 13-17, 1876, Wagner premiered Der Ring des Nibelungen at his purpose-built Bayreuth theater—16 hours over 4 days.

events.desc_zh: 1877/3/4 Tchaikovsky《天鵝湖》莫斯科大劇院首演，芭蕾音樂革命，1895 Petipa 重排後成經典。
events.desc_en: On Mar 4, 1877, Tchaikovsky's Swan Lake premiered at Moscow's Bolshoi—a ballet music revolution; Petipa's 1895 revival made it canonical.

events.zh: Debussy《牧神之午後》·印象派音樂
events.en: Debussy's Prelude to the Afternoon of a Faun
events.desc_zh: 1894/12/22 Debussy《牧神之午後前奏曲》巴黎首演，非傳統和聲與調性，音樂印象派誕生。
events.desc_en: On Dec 22, 1894, Debussy's Prelude to the Afternoon of a Faun premiered in Paris—unconventional harmony birthing musical Impressionism.

events.desc_zh: 1913/5/29 Stravinsky《春之祭》巴黎首演，原始節奏、不協和和聲引發劇院暴動；現代音樂起點。
events.desc_en: On May 29, 1913, Stravinsky's Rite of Spring premiered in Paris, its primal rhythms and dissonance triggering a theater riot—launching modern music.

events.zh: 中國古琴·文人音樂傳統
events.desc_zh: 約前 200 年中國古琴發展成熟，文人七大雅器之首；《廣陵散》《高山流水》成千年經典。
events.desc_en: Around 200 BC, the Chinese guqin matured as the premier literati instrument; pieces like Guangling San and Gaoshan Liushui endured for millennia.

events.desc_zh: 1956/1/27 Elvis 發行《Heartbreak Hotel》，電視 Ed Sullivan 登場震撼保守美國；搖滾進入主流。
events.desc_en: On Jan 27, 1956, Elvis released Heartbreak Hotel; his Ed Sullivan TV appearance shocked conservative America—rock entered the mainstream.

events.desc_zh: 1963/5/27 Bob Dylan《The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan》發行，《Blowin' in the Wind》成民權運動聖歌。
events.desc_en: On May 27, 1963, Bob Dylan released The Freewheelin'; Blowin' in the Wind became the civil rights movement's anthem.

events.zh: Woodstock 音樂節·反文化巔峰
events.desc_zh: 1969/8/15-18 紐約州 Woodstock 音樂節 40 萬人同聚，Hendrix、Janis Joplin、The Who 同台；60s 反文化巔峰。
events.desc_en: From Aug 15-18, 1969, 400,000 gathered at Woodstock, NY; Hendrix, Janis Joplin, and The Who performed—the 60s counterculture's peak.

events.en: Birth of Hip-Hop · DJ Kool Herc
events.desc_zh: 1973/8/11 Bronx 區 DJ Kool Herc 在妹妹派對發明 breakbeat DJ 技巧，Hip-hop 四元素（DJ/MC/breakdance/graffiti）成形。
events.desc_en: On Aug 11, 1973, DJ Kool Herc invented breakbeat DJing at his sister's Bronx party, birthing hip-hop's four elements (DJ/MC/breakdance/graffiti).

events.zh: MTV 頻道開播·視覺音樂時代
events.desc_zh: 1981/8/1 MTV 首播《Video Killed the Radio Star》，音樂錄影帶主導 80-90s；Madonna、Michael Jackson 成視覺偶像。
events.desc_en: On Aug 1, 1981, MTV launched with Video Killed the Radio Star; music videos dominated the 80s-90s, making Madonna and MJ visual icons.

events.desc_zh: 1982/11/30 Michael Jackson《Thriller》發行，售超 7,000 萬張史上最多；14 分鐘 MV 革新音樂錄影帶。
events.desc_en: On Nov 30, 1982, Michael Jackson's Thriller was released, selling over 70M copies (most ever); the 14-min MV revolutionized music videos.

events.desc_zh: 1991/9/24 Nirvana《Nevermind》發行，《Smells Like Teen Spirit》取代 MJ 登 Billboard 第一；油漬搖滾終結 80s 華麗金屬。
events.desc_en: On Sep 24, 1991, Nirvana's Nevermind was released; Smells Like Teen Spirit toppled MJ on Billboard #1, ending the 80s hair metal era with grunge.

events.desc_zh: 1999/6 Napster 由 Shawn Fanning 推出，MP3 點對點分享瓦解音樂銷售模式；2001 遭 RIAA 關閉，但催生串流。
events.desc_en: In Jun 1999, Shawn Fanning launched Napster; MP3 peer-to-peer sharing shattered the sales model; shut by RIAA 2001, it seeded streaming.

events.desc_zh: 2013/6/13 韓團 BTS 出道；2018-2020 3 首 Billboard 冠軍、Grammy 提名；K-pop 成全球現象。
events.desc_en: On Jun 13, 2013, Korean group BTS debuted; their 3 Billboard #1s and Grammy nominations (2018-20) made K-pop a global phenomenon.

events.zh: TikTok 推爆紅·算法主導歌曲
events.desc_zh: 2019+ TikTok 短影片演算法重塑音樂爆紅機制，Old Town Road 成首波 TikTok 冠軍；歌曲結構為 15 秒 hook 設計。
events.desc_en: From 2019, TikTok's algorithm reshaped music virality; Old Town Road was the first TikTok #1; songs are now written for 15-second hooks.

events.desc_zh: 約前 250 年 Archimedes 在 Syracuse 建立浮力原理、槓桿、圓周率逼近、積分雛形；古代最偉大科學家。
events.desc_en: Around 250 BC in Syracuse, Archimedes established buoyancy, levers, π approximation, and proto-integration—antiquity's greatest scientist.

events.desc_zh: 825 Al-Khwarizmi 在巴格達智慧宮著《代數》（algebra）、引介印度數字；algorithm 一詞源自其名。
events.desc_en: In 825, Al-Khwarizmi in Baghdad's House of Wisdom wrote Al-Jabr (algebra) and popularized Indian numerals; 'algorithm' comes from his name.

events.desc_zh: 約 1440 Gutenberg 發明活字印刷術，1455 印《古騰堡聖經》；資訊成本崩跌，啟動宗教改革、科學革命。
events.desc_en: Around 1440, Gutenberg invented movable type; the 1455 Gutenberg Bible marked collapsing info costs, igniting the Reformation and Scientific Revolution.

events.desc_zh: 1945/7/16 美國 New Mexico 進行 Trinity 核試，首次人工核爆成功；大科學（Big Science）時代誕生。
events.desc_en: On Jul 16, 1945, the US detonated the Trinity test in New Mexico—the first nuclear explosion, birthing the Big Science era.

events.zh: ChatGPT 上線·大語言模型普及
events.desc_zh: 2022/11/30 OpenAI ChatGPT 公開，5 日百萬用戶；GPT-3.5 開啟 AGI 討論，2023 GPT-4 再進化。
events.desc_en: On Nov 30, 2022, OpenAI's ChatGPT launched, hitting 1M users in 5 days; GPT-3.5 opened AGI debate; GPT-4 followed in 2023.

events.desc_zh: 約前 530 Pythagoras 在南義大利建哲學社團，畢氏定理雖在巴比倫已知，但被理論化；「萬物皆數」。
events.desc_en: Around 530 BC in southern Italy, Pythagoras founded a philosophical society; the eponymous theorem (known in Babylon) was theorized—'all is number'.

events.desc_zh: 約前 335 Aristotle 在雅典 Lyceum 觀察分類 500+ 動植物，首創自然分類；其自然哲學主導西方 2000 年。
events.desc_en: Around 335 BC at Athens's Lyceum, Aristotle observed and classified 500+ species, founding natural taxonomy; his natural philosophy ruled for 2,000 years.

events.zh: Hero 汽轉球·古代蒸汽機原型
events.desc_zh: 約 70 年亞歷山卓 Hero 發明 aeolipile 汽轉球，蒸汽作動首例；當時作玩具，1700 年後才有蒸汽機。
events.desc_en: Around 70 AD in Alexandria, Hero invented the aeolipile, the first steam-powered device—a toy then; 1,700 years before the industrial steam engine.

events.zh: 沈括《夢溪筆談》·磁羅盤記載
events.desc_zh: 1088 沈括《夢溪筆談》首記磁針指南、地磁偏角；北宋為導航用磁羅盤早期國家。
events.desc_en: In 1088, Shen Kuo's Dream Pool Essays first described magnetized needles and geomagnetic declination; Song China led early navigational compass use.

events.zh: 火藥配方首錄·《武經總要》
events.desc_zh: 1044 北宋《武經總要》首次完整記錄火藥配方；發明可溯至唐代煉丹；後透過蒙古傳至中東、歐洲。
events.desc_en: In 1044, Song China's Wujing Zongyao first fully recorded the gunpowder formula; invented by Tang alchemists, it spread via the Mongols to the Mideast and Europe.

events.zh: Ibn al-Haytham《光學》·科學方法先驅
events.desc_zh: 1021 開羅 Ibn al-Haytham 著 7 卷《光學》，實驗證明光進眼非出眼；建立假設-實驗方法論，早近代科學方法 600 年。
events.desc_en: In 1021 Cairo, Ibn al-Haytham wrote the 7-volume Book of Optics, showing light enters (not exits) the eye and pioneering hypothesis-experiment method—600 years before modern science.

events.desc_zh: 1609-1619 Kepler 依 Brahe 觀測資料導出行星橢圓軌道、面積速度、週期定律；為 Newton 萬有引力舖路。
events.desc_en: From 1609-1619, Kepler derived the three laws of planetary motion from Brahe's data—ellipses, equal areas, harmonic law—paving way for Newton.

events.zh: Harvey 血液循環論·《心運動論》
events.desc_zh: 1628 Harvey 出版《心運動論》，實驗證明血液循環（心臟泵送），推翻 Galen；生理學革命。
events.desc_en: In 1628, Harvey published De Motu Cordis, experimentally proving blood circulates (heart as pump)—overturning Galen and founding physiology.

events.desc_zh: 1662 Boyle 發表氣體定律：定溫下 PV=k；化學從煉金術脫離，Boyle 被稱「現代化學之父」。
events.desc_en: In 1662, Boyle published his gas law (PV=k at constant T); chemistry broke free from alchemy—Boyle called 'father of modern chemistry'.

events.desc_zh: 1831/8/29 Faraday 發現電磁感應，發明發電機原型；工業電氣化基礎。
events.desc_en: On Aug 29, 1831, Faraday discovered electromagnetic induction and built the first dynamo—foundation of industrial electrification.

events.desc_zh: 1865 Maxwell 發表 4 個方程式統一電、磁、光為電磁場理論；預言電磁波，成 Einstein 相對論思想前身。
events.desc_en: In 1865, Maxwell published 4 equations unifying electricity, magnetism, and light as electromagnetic fields—predicting EM waves and seeding relativity.

events.desc_zh: 1896/3/1 Henri Becquerel 偶然發現鈾鹽放射性，Marie & Pierre Curie 延伸研究；1903 三人共享諾貝爾物理獎。
events.desc_en: On Mar 1, 1896, Henri Becquerel accidentally discovered radioactivity in uranium salts; the Curies extended the work—1903 Nobel Prize jointly.

events.desc_zh: 1911/5 Rutherford 以 α 粒子散射實驗證實原子有集中核；1913 Bohr 進一步建氫原子量子模型。
events.desc_en: In May 1911, Rutherford's alpha scattering proved atoms have a concentrated nucleus; Bohr's 1913 hydrogen quantum model followed.

events.desc_zh: 1941/3 Florey、Chain 牛津團隊首次臨床試驗青黴素，1943 美國量產救 WWII 傷兵；1945 三人諾貝爾獎。
events.desc_en: In Mar 1941, Florey and Chain's Oxford team ran the first clinical trial of penicillin; US mass production followed in 1943—1945 Nobel Prize.

events.desc_zh: 1947/12/23 Bell Labs 的 Bardeen, Brattain, Shockley 發明電晶體，固態電子取代真空管；資訊革命基石。
events.desc_en: On Dec 23, 1947, Bell Labs's Bardeen, Brattain, and Shockley invented the transistor; solid-state replaced vacuum tubes—cornerstone of the digital age.

events.zh: 摩爾定律·半導體成長規律
events.desc_zh: 1965/4/19 Gordon Moore 於《Electronics》預言積體電路電晶體數每 2 年倍增；持續 50 年推動資訊革命。
events.desc_en: On Apr 19, 1965, Gordon Moore predicted transistor counts would double every 2 years; held for 50 years, driving the information revolution.

events.desc_zh: 2015/9/14 LIGO 首次直接偵測到 13 億光年外黑洞合併重力波，驗證 Einstein 100 年前預言；2017 諾貝爾物理獎。
events.desc_en: On Sep 14, 2015, LIGO directly detected gravitational waves from a 1.3B ly black hole merger, validating Einstein's 100-year-old prediction; 2017 Nobel Prize.

events.desc_zh: 2020/11/30 DeepMind AlphaFold 2 在 CASP14 競賽以 AI 解決 50 年蛋白質摺疊難題，預測 2 億結構；2024 諾貝爾化學獎。
events.desc_en: On Nov 30, 2020, DeepMind's AlphaFold 2 solved the 50-year protein folding problem at CASP14, predicting 200M structures—2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry.

events.desc_zh: 2019/10/23 Google Sycamore 54 量子位元處理器 200 秒完成傳統超算需 1 萬年的隨機電路取樣，量子優越性首度宣稱。
events.desc_en: On Oct 23, 2019, Google's 54-qubit Sycamore processor completed in 200s a random circuit sampling task estimated at 10,000 years classically—claimed quantum supremacy.

events.zh: 荷蘭東印度公司·首家股份公司
events.desc_zh: 1602/3/20 荷蘭 VOC 成立，首家公開發行股票的跨國公司；壟斷亞洲貿易 200 年，近代金融與公司制度原型。
events.desc_en: On Mar 20, 1602, the Dutch VOC was founded as the first publicly traded multinational; monopolized Asia trade for 200 years—a prototype of modern finance.

events.zh: WTO 成立·全球貿易體系
events.desc_zh: 1995/1/1 世界貿易組織 WTO 取代 GATT 正式成立，124 創始國；全球關稅降至新低、貿易自由化浪潮。
events.desc_en: On Jan 1, 1995, the WTO formally replaced GATT with 124 founding members; global tariffs hit new lows in a wave of liberalization.

events.zh: 中國加入 WTO·世界工廠
events.desc_zh: 2001/12/11 中國加入 WTO，接軌全球市場；其後 20 年成世界工廠，GDP 從第 6 升至第 2（2010 年超日本）。
events.desc_en: On Dec 11, 2001, China joined the WTO; over the next 20 years it became the world's factory, rising from 6th to 2nd GDP (surpassing Japan in 2010).

events.desc_zh: 2013/9/7 習近平在哈薩克宣布「絲綢之路經濟帶」，10 月海上絲路；中國主導基建+貿易，150+ 國簽署。
events.desc_en: On Sep 7, 2013, Xi Jinping announced the Silk Road Economic Belt in Kazakhstan; with the Maritime Silk Road, 150+ countries signed on—China-led infrastructure and trade.

events.desc_zh: 1956/4/26 Malcom McLean 首航貨櫃輪 Ideal X 從 Newark 到休斯頓；貨櫃標準化後 70% 全球貿易走海運。
events.desc_en: On Apr 26, 1956, Malcom McLean's Ideal X sailed from Newark to Houston—the first containerized voyage; standardization later drove 70% of global trade by sea.

events.desc_zh: 約前 1200 Phoenicia 從黎巴嫩沿海擴張，貿易紫色染料、玻璃、雪松木；建迦太基、Cadiz；拓 22 字母影響希臘。
events.desc_en: Around 1200 BC, Phoenicia expanded from Lebanese coasts, trading Tyrian purple, glass, and cedar; founded Carthage and Cadiz; spread the 22-letter alphabet.

events.zh: 張騫通西域·絲路正式開通
events.desc_zh: 前 138 漢武帝派張騫出使西域，歷 13 年返；絲綢、馬匹、香料、宗教沿絲路東西互通千年。
events.desc_en: In 138 BC, Han Wu sent Zhang Qian to the Western Regions; he returned after 13 years—silk, horses, spices, and religions flowed along the Silk Road for 1,000 years.

events.zh: 漢薩同盟·北歐貿易壟斷
events.desc_zh: 1356 北歐德語城市正式締結 Hanseatic 同盟，300 年壟斷波羅的海-北海貿易；鼎盛 200 城市 + 海外 kontor。
events.desc_en: In 1356, northern German cities formally formed the Hanseatic League, monopolizing Baltic-North Sea trade for 300 years; at peak 200 cities with overseas kontors.

events.zh: 印度洋三角貿易·阿拉伯+印度+東非
events.desc_zh: 800-1500 印度洋以阿拉伯 dhow 帆船連通波斯灣、古吉拉特、Swahili 海岸；印度棉布、東非黃金、阿拉伯馬、中國瓷器互通。
events.desc_en: From 800-1500, Arab dhows linked the Persian Gulf, Gujarat, and the Swahili Coast; Indian cotton, East African gold, Arabian horses, and Chinese porcelain flowed.

events.desc_zh: 約 1000 宋代泉州（Zaiton）成世界最大港，阿拉伯、波斯商人雲集；瓷器、絲綢、茶葉大量出口；首發紙幣交子。
events.desc_en: Around 1000, Song China's Quanzhou (Zaiton) became the world's largest port, with Arab and Persian merchants; porcelain, silk, and tea exports boomed alongside the first paper money (jiaozi).

events.desc_zh: 1600/12/31 Elizabeth I 特許英國東印度公司（BEIC）壟斷亞洲貿易；18 世紀後實質統治印度，1858 解散。
events.desc_en: On Dec 31, 1600, Elizabeth I chartered the British East India Company (BEIC) to monopolize Asian trade; by the 18th century it effectively ruled India until 1858.

events.zh: 大西洋三角貿易·奴隸制
events.desc_zh: 1650-1808 三角貿易：歐洲貨物→非洲奴隸→美洲礦產與蔗糖→歐洲；運載 1,250 萬非洲奴隸，死亡率 15%。
events.desc_en: From 1650-1808, the triangular trade: European goods → African slaves → American minerals and sugar → Europe; 12.5M Africans shipped, 15% mortality.

events.zh: 南海泡沫·首次現代金融泡沫
events.desc_zh: 1720/8 英國南海公司股價從 £128 飆至 £1,050 後崩盤，Newton 虧 2 萬鎊，說「可計算天體運行不能算人類瘋狂」。
events.desc_en: In Aug 1720, South Sea Company shares soared from £128 to £1,050 then crashed; Newton lost £20k, saying 'I can calculate the motions of bodies, but not the madness of men.'

events.zh: 第一次鴉片戰爭·英強迫中國開市
events.desc_zh: 1839-1842 清林則徐銷煙後，英派艦隊迫清簽南京條約：開 5 通商港、割香港、賠款；中國半殖民地化起點。
events.desc_en: After Lin Zexu burned opium in 1839, Britain's fleet forced China's 1842 Treaty of Nanking: 5 treaty ports, Hong Kong ceded, indemnity—starting China's semi-colonial era.

events.zh: 蘇伊士運河通航·亞歐海運革命
events.desc_zh: 1869/11/17 蘇伊士運河通航，大幅縮短歐亞航程；法國主導、英國後買下 44% 股權；中東地緣戰略價值暴漲。
events.desc_en: On Nov 17, 1869, the Suez Canal opened, drastically shortening Europe-Asia voyages; French-led, later 44% bought by Britain—raising Middle East strategic value.

events.desc_zh: 1870-1914 國際金本位盛行，主要貨幣對黃金固定兌換；促跨國投資但缺乏貨幣政策彈性；WWI 崩潰。
events.desc_en: From 1870-1914, the classical gold standard fixed major currencies to gold—boosting international investment but limiting monetary flexibility; collapsed with WWI.

events.desc_zh: 1947/10/30 23 國在日內瓦簽 GATT 關稅貿易總協定，戰後關稅自由化框架；8 輪談判後 1995 升級為 WTO。
events.desc_en: On Oct 30, 1947, 23 nations signed GATT in Geneva—the postwar tariff-reduction framework; after 8 rounds, it became the WTO in 1995.

events.desc_zh: 1971/8/15 Nixon 宣布美元停止兌換黃金，終結 Bretton Woods 體系；世界進入純信用貨幣+浮動匯率時代。
events.desc_en: On Aug 15, 1971, Nixon suspended dollar-gold convertibility, ending Bretton Woods; the world entered fiat money and floating exchange rates.

events.zh: NAFTA 北美自由貿易協定
events.desc_zh: 1994/1/1 美加墨 NAFTA 生效，首個已開發+開發中國家大規模自由貿易區；2020 Trump 改 USMCA。
events.desc_en: On Jan 1, 1994, NAFTA took effect among US/Canada/Mexico—the first large free-trade zone between developed and developing nations; Trump renegotiated as USMCA in 2020.

events.zh: 美中貿易戰·去全球化訊號
events.desc_zh: 2018/3/22 Trump 對中國加徵關稅開啟美中貿易戰，擴至科技封鎖、晶片限制；疑全球化逆轉、供應鏈重組。
events.desc_en: On Mar 22, 2018, Trump tariffs ignited the US-China trade war, escalating to tech decoupling and chip restrictions—raising questions about globalization reversal.
